Additionally, **Recovering** or **Saving** grants both you and the recipient **+25%** [**Power**](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌") for **25 Seconds.** _(Also applies to self-recovering and self-saving.)_

### `Passive:` `Renewal`

Re-inscribe **Undone Inscriptions** **100% Faster.**
Jordyn may re-inscribe undone inscriptions **thrice**, with **Burned Inscriptions** appearing in a hazy shadow of themselves. Burned Inscriptions reveal their **Auras** to Jordyn when within **50 Studs**.
Jordyn’s base **Blessing** & **Ritual** **Action Speeds** are increased by **50%.**
If a **Glyph** is **snuffed**, the **Aura** of the **Inscription** and the **Killer** are revealed to Jordyn for **5 Seconds** and an audio-cue of a Crow cawing will play.
Upon **Stunning** a Killer with at least **25% Damage Contributed**, recharge one charge of all **Runes** equipped. Runes with **One Charge** as their max value will require **50%+ Damage Contributed** to benefit from _Renewal_.

### `AB1/Q:` `Within`

Jordyn has a meter at the bottom of the screen displayed as _“Arcana,”_ which will fill up over time up to **100**. Jordyn’s **Black Glove** will grow brighter with arcane energy as he nears **100% Within Charge.** At **Max Charge**, two small purple wisps will float randomly around his Glove.
The rate at which it fills up and the methods in which it fills up are as follows;

- _0.25%/s Passively_
- _0.5%/s Performing Repairs_
- _1%/s Re-inscribing_
- _1%/s Cleansing_
- _2%/s Blessing_
- _2%/s Initiating a Ritual_
- _1% per 1% of Killer Health Damaged_

Jordyn may use these charges of Arcana to perform a variety of actions involving his **Black Glove**. On activation of _Within,_ 4 **Invocations** will appear in a radial menu on the screen, and hovering over an Invocation and clicking it will invoke it.
Invocations are listed as follows;

- _“Shadewalker”:_ Consume **25% Arcana** to gain **Silenced**, +**4% Haste**, and hide **Shadows** for **3 Seconds.** _15 Second Cooldown_
- _“Seeker”:_ Consume **30% Arcana** to create three small souls that quickly roam randomly around the map on different paths at **35 Walkspeed**, revealing all enemies that enter it’s LoS within **30 Studs** for **5 Seconds** to **Jordyn.** _30 Second Cooldown_
- _“Shadow Weave”:_ Consume **75% Arcana** to gain **Concealed** for **30 Seconds** and become invisible past **75 Studs.** Within 50 Studs, Jordyn is intermittently visible, portions of his body invisible. _60 Second Cooldown_
- _“Imbue: Soul”:_ Consume **100% Arcana** to imbue all weapons with arcane energy for **20 Seconds**, causing all damage instances dealt during to inflict an additional instance of damage **1 Second** after that deals **50%** of the original damage value as **True Damage** to all enemies within **40 Studs.** Additional damage dealt by this ability will not charge Arcana. _150 Second Cooldown_

### `AB2/E:` `Ritualist`

Jordyn kneels down, beginning to inscribe a ritual circle with mystical energy from within his glove. This process takes **20 Seconds.** After he finishes, a menu will open that allows him to imbue the ritual circle with one of four options:

- _“Emissary”: Spawn a soul from the ritual circle that will travel around the map, collecting materials and highlight any enemies within 50 Studs of it that are in it’s LoS. Upon spotting an enemy, it will pause and stare at them until they leave it’s vision or after 5 Seconds have passed. All collected materials will be brought back to the ritual circle._
- _“Archon”: Spawn a large soul wielding a soul-blade. It will roam slowly around the map, fighting enemies. On hit, the soul will deal **70 True Damage** with a **1.2 Second** cooldown between swings and highlight the enemy it hits to all Survivors for **2 Seconds.** Every 30 Seconds, the soul is healed for **50% Max HP** by the ritual circle. If the soul dies, it respawns after **30 Seconds.**_
- _“Echo Shard”: Create a floating mystic shard that can be interacted with by Survivors. Upon interacting with it, a menu opens that allows the Survivor to duplicate one of three randomly selected items in their inventory. After performing this, it cannot be interacted with again by that Survivor for **60 Seconds.** The duplicated items will bypass the material inventory limit._
- _“Veil”: Create a **130 Stud Veil Zone** around the ritual circle which will reveal the **Auras** of all subjects inside to Jordyn and render all players inside of the zone invisible to players on the outside. This does not effected Jordyn. Revealed subjects include; Survivors, Killer, Entities, Objectives, Materials, Vaults, and Wedges._

There is a global limit of **two ritual circles** created by this ability. These ritual circles can be snuffed by the Killer.

- _70s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `Mind's Eye`

Jordyn places his gloved hand overtop his eyes as he begins to channel his **Mind’s Eye**, with a mystic, purple line projecting from the top of it, before opening into an eye. He then gains the ability to see all moving enemies through walls in a cone ahead of him, highlighting them in purple. In this state, he is able to focus on those targets, taking **3 Seconds** to fully focus on them. Upon completing this process, that target is effected by the following effects;

- **Highlighted** to **all Survivors** for **5 Seconds**
- Take **20%** of all taken damage as an extra instance of **True Damage** after the effect of **Mind’s Eye** expires

Jordyn moves at a walkspeed of **15** while channeling this ability. The full channeling duration takes **2.5 Seconds.** The focusing state can be cancelled early.

- _50s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Re-Inscribe, Bless, Cleanse, or perform a Ritual 250 Times_
- _Achievement 2 - Escape Chase using Within 150 Times_
- _Achievement 3 - Create 200 Ritual Circles using Ritualist_
- _Achievement 4 - Reveal the Killer 500 Times using Mind’s Eye_
- _Achievement 5 - Escape 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] X** -_
cards.name: Jordyn Stave

cards.desc:
# **Milo Greyson**

## _"There’s something moving in the veil, it seems to be coming back to us..?"_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `19`
`Birthdate:` `15th February`
`Nationality:` `Danish-American`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

Milo is a light orange-haired man wearing goggles. His hair is fluffy and parts in the front, displaying the goggles. He dons a thick white jacket with green accents and a zipper down the front, alongside having a thick fabric neck. He also wears matching white jeans and black combat boots.

Alongside this, he holds a radar gun-like tool, having a handle with a trigger. On the back of the handle facing Milo is a screen display, showing a radar. It’s body is made of a grey metal. Past the handle, it fans out into a large retractable radar-dish like cone, surrounding a probe with a large orbicular tip that is placed into a holster in the centre of the dish.

While idle, the fan is retracted and the device appears as a radar-like gun with a probe sticking out there the barrel would be. When monitoring, the radar will expand.

_"Lore Excerpt"_

## **Overview**

Milo is a very skill-expressive character, having unrivalled information gathering with his probes, but as a user of him you must be skilled enough to successfully receive the responses sent from the probes and gain the information they give.

`Idle Animation:` Stands normally with his device at his side, looking back and forth occassionaly.

`Walking Animation:` Default. _(With exceptions for his device.)_

`Sprinting Animation:` Default. _(With exceptions for his device.)_

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Great Information Gathering
\+Rewards Quick Response Time
\+Survivability & Reliability

\-Must Be Attentive to your Pings
\-Aim Reliant if going for Killer Probes
\-Positioning Reliant

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Technical`
- `Difficulty: 3/5 - Advanced`
- `Health: 100`
- `Stamina: 8`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.6`

## **Obtainment**

- _Complete the_ [_Tutorial_](https://trello.com/c/dsI0IHMP/207-into-the-unknown-free-tutorial "‌")

## **Loadout**

### _Mentioned_ [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/YdjpMXPW/21-status-effects-status-hud "‌"):

Status Effects that appear within this Character’s Kit.

- _Distortion_ - Conceals all actions, blocks all Aura-reading, silences footsteps, Loud Noise Notifications, and all ambient noises _(Ambient Killer Noises, Survivor Breathing, & Grunts of Pain)_ as well as applying the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.

### **Perks**

_**Engineer’s Fault [1 Points]**_ | _“Rule 7 of the Engineer’s Handbook, one must take responsibility for their faults, while also maintaining vigilance it not become theirs, or someone else’s issue.“_
Reduce the amount of progress lost for **Failed Skill Checks** by **30%/40%/50%** and suppress **Loud Noise Notifications** for failing Skill Checks performed by you or another Survivor working with you. _Loud Noise Notification Suppression may only occur once every 25 Seconds._

_**Workflow [4 Points]**_ | _“Rule 3 of the Engineer’s Handbook, one must not interrupt the workplace flow.“_
Performing a **Successful Skill Check** will grant **1 Stack**. **Great Skill Checks** grant double.
For every stack of _Workflow_, the following effects are applied:

- _Increase **Repair Speed** by **0.25%**_
- _Increase **Skill Check Rotation Speed** by **0.2%**_

**Failing** a Skill Check will reset all stacks. Lose **1 Stack** every **4/6/8 Seconds** spent not repairing.

_**Hyperfocus [4 Points]**_ | _“Years of obsessive work and pure, unabated interest will train you how to get into the flow state.“_
The following effects are applied while performing the **Repair Action**:

- Increase the base chance of a **Skill Check** appearing to **12%/14%/16%.**
- Increase the amount of progress a **Great Skill Check** adds by **100%**.
- Increase **Skill Check Rotation Speed** by **15%.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Balance**_ | _“Maintaining a work-life balance is important for ones health.“_
Successfully completing a **Repair Action** will heal you for **50%** of the charges you contributed to the objective and gain a stack of **Balance**.
Each stack of **Balance** will grant the following effects permanently:

- _Increase **Action Speed** by **4%**_
- _Increase **Healing Speed** by **4%**_
- _Increase **Good & Great Skill Check Success Zones** by **2%**_

### `Passive:` `Sub-Layer Response Monitor`

Hold down the **Passive Ability Key** to hold the **Monitor** up, which will expand out the radar on the device. A green and black display with a rotating line. A 40° Cone will be displayed, moving with the direction Milo is facing. A ping will ring out every time a response is received from the Refraction Device, which will remain in effect for **8 Seconds.** Milo must be facing the direction of where the response was sent until the rotating line crosses over it, which will “Receive” the response and log it and display a dot(s) for every subject detected. When locking onto a response, a droning sound will play to signal that Milo is looking in the correct direction. The receiving must be focused, and if the subject that was detected must be within the detection cone for the full **2 Seconds** it takes to receive the response. Only one subject must be detected, with the detection detecting all the surrounding targets.

If Milo successfully logs a response, the detected subject will have their **Aura** revealed to all Survivors for **10 Seconds** and grant himself **Distortion** and **+5% Haste** for **10 Seconds.**

If a response is logged within **5 Seconds** of it being sent, the duration of the **Aura Reveal** will have an added **+5 Seconds.**

### `AB1/Q:` `Sub-Layer Refraction Device`

On use; zoom into first person and aim forward. Upon clicking, shoot the probe forward, which will then stick into any surface or subject before sending out a loud ping, sending a response to the **Monitor**. Afterwards, it will send out a ping every **15 Seconds**, which will send a **Response** to the Monitor if it detects the **Killer** or a **Tier III+ Entity** within a **90 Stud Range**, otherwise it will not send a response.

3 Probes can be present on the map at one time, and firing a new one will destroy the oldest one.

If the probe is embedded into a **Killer**, the probe will only persist for **60 Seconds.**

- _60s Cooldown (After firing)_

### `AB2/E:` `C.L.O.A.K`

Milo stops in place, shielding himself with his jacket for **1.5 Seconds**, the jacket suddenly glowing brightly, **Blinding** any enemy that looks at him for longer than **1 Second** while he is in this state for **2.5 Seconds.**

- _40s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `Sub-Layer Field Projection Device`

On use, Milo takes out a round, plated device with a small bulb on the tip of it. He is given the option to place it down on a surface near him. Upon placing it down, he is prompted to place a second one. Upon placing the second in a limited area fro the first one, a line is sent from the first device to the second before a large barrier is projected vertically upwards and downwards from the line, forming a projected wall.

Milo can switch the device’s mode between **Field Distortion** or **Field Disruption.**

- In **Field Distortion Mode**, anything that walks through the field has it’s outside perception **Distorted**, granting the target **Distortion** for **5 Seconds.**
- In **Field Disruption Mode**, any enemy that walks through the field causes a ripple to be sent out that gives an audible notification to all Survivors and **highlights** the target for **5 Seconds.**

The field is vaguely visible to Killers, appearing very transparent and dimmed, making it difficult to see. The fields are highlighted to nearby Survivors.
The devices can be destroyed by Killers by interacting with them.

- _60s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Receive 500 Responses_
- _Achievement 2 - Embed a Probe into the Killer 150 Times using Sub-Layer Refraction Device_
- _Achievement 3 - Blind the Killer 200 Times using C.L.O.A.K_
- _Achievement 4 - Reveal the Killer 250 Times using Sub-Layer Field Projection Device_
- _Achievement 5 - Escape 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] X** -_
cards.name: Milo Greyson

cards.desc:
# **Heather Warren - The Hunter**

## _"I don't have bad dreams. When I sleep, everything sleeps.."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `22`
`Birthdate:` `March 15th`
`Origin:` `American`
`Gender:` `Cis Female`

The Hunter wears tattered Camo hunting clothes with a tattered and ripped brown leather cloak, a Mask, has a black satchel on her right hip, and a large, dirtied backpack. The weapons she uses are a heavy-duty Kukri style Machete, a Compound Bow, and coil spring beartraps. She carries the beartraps in his satchel, and his Compound Bow on her back.

_"An enigmatic, sheltered child raised in relative solitude, Heather was never able to learn true empathy for others. Her parents had never allowed any exposure to negative outside stimuli, disapproving of any friends she may have made in her private school, and hovering over her every step of the way, while spoiling her with every single thing she could ever want, convincing her the world was her plaything._

_This had the unforeseen side-effect of instilling a deep-rooted obsession with anything and everything macabre once her parents passed and their large estate became hers, all of those things her parents shielded her from hitting her at once, and causing her to gain a chilling fascination with violence, albeit her understanding of it’s ‘wrong-ness' was twisted, believing it was wrong by her parents rules and not societal norms itself._

_So she began to hunt, snatching up the unfortunate, poor souls off the streets too far gone to be remembered or looked for by anyone, bringing them to her hunting grounds to begin her twisted and bloody pursuits driven by her psychopathic, narcissistic delusions."_

## **Overview**

**Hunter** is a simple-to-use **Killer**, specializing in controlling the map through his beartraps, as well as using her Bow in chase to inflict some extra damage to down **Survivors**.

`Idle Animation:` Hunter stands idle, looking side to side every now and then with both arms slack to her side.
`Moving Animation:` Hunter runs with an arm in front of her, her other arm wielding his machete to her side.
`Tether Animation:` Default humanoid tether animation.
`Spawn Animation:` Hunter is seen polishing a bear trap before looking forward, putting the handkerchief and bear-trap back into her satchel before unsheathing her machete.

`Weapon - Hunting Machete:` A slightly rusted heavy-duty Kukri style machete, used for hacking and maneuvering through the dense wilderness.
`Standard Attack Animation:` Swing the machete forward in a downward vertical strike/chop, then wipe the blood off with your clothed arm.
`Requiem Kill Animation:` _Hunter slashes the Survivor’s face, knocking them backwards, before throwing a trap forward by it’s chain using her left hand. The trap closes on the Survivor’s face, and she yanks the chain back to pull them in close, and as they are pulled in front of her she stabs her machete through their stomach, finishing them off._

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Easy to Use
\+Easy to Learn
\+Map-wide Control & Monitoring (Traps & Cameras)
\+Reliable Ranged Option & Pierce

\-Has to set up to get to Full Potential
\-Traps can be Disarmed
\-Traps can be avoided
\-Can Step in own Traps
\-Aim Reliant Ability

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Control`
- `Difficulty: 1/5 - Beginner`
- `Health: 60,000`
- `Walk-Speed: 26`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 92`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 50`
- `Attack Cooldown: 1.3`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

[_**Hunter Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/6LibGC7X/418-hunter "‌")

### _Mentioned_ [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌"):

Status Effects that appear within this Character’s Kit.

- _**Haste**_ - % Movement Speed increase.
- _**Deep Wounds**_ - Increases the Charges required to heal by **25%**, and also decreasing healing speeds by **25%** for one Heal. (Applies to healing self or being healed by others)
- _**Bleed**_ - Targets suffering from **Bleed** will take **1 Damage** per tick. Does not damage at or below **10 HP.** For each tier above 1, will halve the amount of time between each tick, starting from **1 second.**
- _**Hinder/Hindered**_ - % Movement Speed reduction.
- _**Poison**_ - Targets suffering from **Poison** will take **1 Damage/0.5s** and will suppress all forms of healing.

### **Perks**

_**Selective Hunting [2 Points]**_ | _“Trophy hunting is within your nature.”_
Become **Fixated** on the **Survivor** with the most **Generator Progress Contributed.** When you enter **Chase** with that **Survivor**, their **Aura** is revealed to you for **10 Seconds**. This will happen every single time you start **Chase**.

_**Small Game [1 Points]**_ | _“Savor even the very last drop of blood spilled.”_
Upon downing a Survivor, gain **10/20/30%** **Haste** for **4 Seconds.**

_**Beast of Prey [2 Points]**_ | _“Strike fear into those you pursue, they’ll slip up eventually.”_
When entering any tier of **Bloodlust**, gain **Concealed** as well until **Bloodlust** ends and adds an extra **+0.25/0.5/0.75 Walk-Speed** to every tier of **Bloodlust**.
Gain **25/50/75%** more **Fog Essence** in the **Pursuit Score**.

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Game Warden**_ | _“You deserve this, it’s is your birthright to take possession over these lands.”_
From the beginning of the match (_Including Preparation Phase_), there is a **240 Second** duration in which **Survivors** cannot pick up **any naturally spawned Material, Tool, or Weapon.**
Any Survivor who attempts to pick up an item during this period will have their **Aura** revealed for **2 Seconds** with the icon for **Game Warden** appearing as a debuff.

### `[Passive]:` `Trapper`

Switch between Coil-Spring Traps and Barbed Tripwire.

- _1s Cooldown_

### `[AB1/Z]:` `Coil-Spring Traps / Barbed Tripwire`

The Hunter has access to two separate traps, starting the match with **10 Coil-Spring Beartraps** and an unlimited amount of **Tripwires**, although a maximum of **6 Tripwires** can be placed before the earliest one placed is destroyed. These traps can be placed anywhere on the map with a minimum distance of **6 Studs** from an **Objective** and another trap.

The bear-traps can be placed by holding this ability, in which The Hunter will enter a **2.5 Seconds** animation of placing and setting the trap up as long as this ability is held until finished, allowing the animation to be canceled. Stepping in her own traps will cause The Hunter to be stunned for **1 Second**, taking an extra second afterwards to reset the trap. There is a **3 Second** grace period after placing a trap where The Hunter cannot be caught in her owns traps. Placed traps can be picked up or reset by interacting with them. Setting, resetting, and picking up traps will grant The Hunter **5% Haste** for **3 Seconds.** _(Picking up takes 0.75 Seconds, Resetting takes 1.5 Seconds.)_
Survivors who step into these traps will instantly take **50 Damage**, trigger a **Loud-Noise Notification**, and become trapped; instantly being afflicted with **Deep Wounds.** Traps can deal fatal damage.
Escape attempts for Survivors will take **1.5 Seconds** each with a **15% Chance** each time, increasing by **5%** with each consecutive attempt. The **6th Attempt** will always succeed. Trapped Survivors can be rescued by other Survivors with a guaranteed escape.

The Hunter’s tripwires are long, barbed wires that extend from one spike to another. On use, The Hunter will crouch down, placing a spike into the ground during a **1 Second** animation. Afterwards, The Hunter can extend this tripwire to any other valid location within **6 Studs**, in which upon confirming she will place another spike into the ground and attach the wire to it alongside a flare. The Hunter cannot trigger her own tripwires.
Survivors who step into these tripwires will cause the flare to go off, revealing their **Aura**, triggering a unique **Loud-Noise Notification**, and afflict the Survivor with **Bleed II** and **15% Hinder** for **5 Seconds.**

Both of these traps can be disarmed by Survivors, with a **3.5 Second** disarming animation playing. After disarming, it will trigger a **Loud-Noise Notification** at that location.

### `[AB2/X]:` `Hunter's Expertise`

Hunter pulls her compound bow from its sleeve, taking an arrow from the accompanying quiver. She then draws the arrow back, which zooms the camera in over the course of a 1.4-second animation. Upon pressing the left mouse button (LMB), she fires the arrow. On hit, pierces and deals **60 Damage** and inflicts **Bleed I** for **15 Seconds.** (_Projectile moves at 60 Studs/s, and has a 300 Stud Max Range_) The draw animation takes **1.4 Seconds**.

Can be fired early but will only deal **50% Damage** and **half** the **Bleed Duration.**

- _14s Cooldown_

### `[AB3/C]:` `Lace`

One use, prompted with an option to lace either the Hunter’s tripwire or an arrow for their bow.

If the tripwire is chosen, an animation will play of the Hunter taking out a portion of their wires and coating them with a bottle of a toxic liquid. This will cause the next tripwire to be placed to become a laced tripwire.

If the arrow is chosen, an animation will play of the Hunter taking out an arrow, coating it with the bottle of toxic liquid. This will cause the next arrow fired to become a laced arrow.

Both will cause **Poison I** to be afflicted for **5 Seconds** on-hit.

- _30s Cooldown_

### `[AB4/V]:` `Game Camera`

The Hunter starts the match with **4 Game Cameras.** These cameras can be placed anywhere on the map, playing a **1.5 Second** animation of the Hunter retrieving a camera and tripod from her backpack and setting it up.

These cameras can be retrieved by interacting with the camera you wish to retrieve while standing next to it.

Holding **V** will have the Hunter take out a tablet, turning it on and looking through it. This will cause the screen to change to that of a tablet, allowing the Hunter to switch between each of their places cameras with **LMB** or **RMB.** The Hunter can freely look around while controlling a camera. Looking at a Survivor that is within **50 Studs** through the camera for more than **2 Seconds** will cause their **Aura** to be revealed for **7 Seconds** and **Killer Instinct** to play on them.

To exit the tablet view, simply press **V** again.

- _5s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Trap 100 Survivors using Coil-Spring Traps_
- _Achievement 2 - Trip 100 Survivors using Tripwires_
- _Achievement 3 - Deal 100,000 Total Damage using “Lace”_
- _Achievement 4 - Land “Hunter’s Expertise” 100 Times_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 250 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Rebirther** - Skin Based on “Amanda’s Rebirth” Cosmetic from Dead by Daylight._
cards.name: The Hunter

cards.desc:
# **Kathy Woods - The Nurse**

## _“I.. will have my beautiful day.._“

### **Profile**

`Age:` `27`
`Birthdate:` `April 3rd`
`Origin:` `American`
`Gender:` `Cis Female`

A tall, slim figure that is hunched over; wielding a bloodied and rusted pair of scissors in her right hand and a dirty syringe embedded into her other hand, it’s needle pointing outwards through her bandages. There are dark veins originating from the embed point that are visible above the bandages.
She has multiple syringes stuck inside of her left arm in various location.
Wears an old nurses gown with dirt and old, dried blood splattered all of it, notably ripped at her wrists, neck, and waist and a dishevelled nurse’s cap.
Dirty bandages with dried and old blood cover all of her exposed skin; face with an opening for her left eye, hands up to wrists, and legs up to her knees.
Her eye is blood-shot, and her iris is a sickly dark green, and it has an opaque film over it. The visible skin around her eye seems to be folded over, and has a silky, wet film over it as well. There are dry tear streaks down her cheek and onto the bandages.
She shambles as she walks out of chase. Once entering chase, her head will perk upwards as she begins to run with a limp.

_"Kathy Woods had a rough childhood growing up, her mother was neglectful and was never with one man. Every figure in her life had left her again and again, never paying the mind to her as a child. Although, one day in her teenage years, her mother married a man; Felix. He was an upstanding and influential figure, owning an Rehabilitation & Wellness Institute, but behind closed doors was a horrific monster. Since being a child, all Kathy had ever wanted was a beautiful wedding with a man she loved.. but Felix wanted to craft her into his own, obedient play-toy. Forcing her to take courses to become a Nurse, and beating her if she refused. Her mother was apathetic, just happy to have her husbands money now, and he took advantage of that; having all of the freedom and time to manipulate Kathy into exactly what he wanted without resistance._

_Over time, Kathy lost herself.. the years passing by, attaining her nursing license, and being hired at her step father’s institution. The time blurred by, with Kathy becoming nothing but an empty tool, until one day.. her step father grew increasingly bold, eventually drugging her with sleeping medications and taking her to a supply closet to take advantage of her state; weakly fighting back and barely clinging onto consciousness. In a burst of repressed will, she grabbed a pair of suturing scissors and jammed it into his neck; twisting it and slicing open his carotid, using her knowledge of anatomy against him as he tries to beat her down, bleeding profusely before losing consciousness on the ground._

_As she walks out of the supply closet in her bloodied gown and wrapping her wounds in gauze, a black fog fills the end of the hall.. but she continues absent-mindedly walking, imagining visions of her only dream._

_Kathy Woods will have her beautiful day.”_

## **Overview**

The Nurse is a great beginner character and amazing introduction into more advanced Killer kits, as she has some insane damage potential if used correctly. She is great all around, having great damage potential, low cooldowns, heal denial, and basekit exhaustion! Alongside this, she has amazing perks that should be higher up in the list of priorities for unlocking.

`Idle Animation:` Hunched over, twitching her head with both arms dangling down.

`Moving Animation:` Shambles forward, arms dangling.

`Weapon - Kathy's Revenge:` The larynx of Felix Woods, now hardened into a solid mass and formed into a pair of calcified suturing scissors.

`(Standard Attack Animation:` Stabs downwards with her scissors, before pulling it back up and wiping the new blood off of it.

`Requiem Kill Animation:` _Nurse charges at the Survivor, stabbing her scissors directly into their neck; pushing it deeper in again and again before twisting it. She then jabs them in the neck a few more times in various locations; leaving them bleeding out and spasming on the ground and looking down at them, extra bloody now._

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Great Healing from Multiple Sources
\+Amazing Heal Denial
\+High Damage
\+Insane Damage Potential
\+Basekit Exhaustion with easy activation
\+Great Perks
\+Stamina Drain
\+Extremely Low Cooldowns
\+Self-Cleansing

\-Slow with weak mobility
\-Slightly Lower Standard Attack Damage
\-Strongest Ability is Aim Reliant
\-Self-Damage

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Hexer`
- `Difficulty: 2/5 - Intermediate`
- `Health: 68,500`
- `Walk-Speed: 24`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 100`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 50`
- `Attack Cooldown: 1.6`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

[_**The Nurse’s Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/vQoUypBn/349-nurse "‌")

### **Perks**

_**Hematophobia [2 Points]**_ | _“She was always paralyzed at the sight of blood, yet was so keen to it’s presence.”_
All **Survivors** within **65/75/85 Studs** of you that are performing a **Healing Action** or are the subject of a **Healing Action** have their **Aura** revealed to you as long as they remain in range.

_**Trypanophobia [1 Point]**_ | _“Millions of pins and needles find their way beneath your skin.”_
Increases the **Stamina Drain** of Survivors who are afflicted by **Bleeding, Haemorrhaged, Mangled, Open Wounds, Deep Wounds,** or **Fatal Wounds** by **20%/35%/50%.**

_**Repression [1 Point]**_ | _“Repressed trauma haunt you.”_
**Survivors** gain a stacking **1%/2%/3% Proficiency Reduction** for every **45 Seconds** outside of your **Terror Radius.**

- _Caps at **30% Deficiency.**_

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Pain Synesthesia [4 Points]**_ | _“If only she could make them feel the same pain she was put through.“_
Become **Fixated** with a random **Survivor.** Any time the **Fixated Survivor** takes damage, **100%** of the damage they take is divided by the amount of remaining applicable Survivors and distributed across all of those Survivors equally. _(Does not effect Downed Survivors.)_

_Only applies to damage instances above one. If the product of the divided damage is below one, it will not deal damage. All decimals are rounded up._

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _Anaphylaxis_ - Increases Stamina Drain by **+100%.** Causes the **Survivor’s** screen to begin blurring in and out and the camera to become unsteady during it’s effects.
- _Stitches -_ An effect exclusive to **The Nurse** that modifies the behavior of _“Suture.”_

### `Passive:` `A Nurse's Calling`

Passively store blood inside of Kathy’s syringe as she deals damage _(1:1 Ratio)_ and **Survivors** heal. It can store a sum total of **250 Blood**, displayed in it’s icon. Anytime a **Survivor** completes a **Healing Action** that restores **Health**, immediately add **50 Blood** to the **Blood Count.**

Can be used with it’s Active Ability or by Kathy’s abilities.

_Active Ability;_ Use ability to raise her left hand up and inject herself in the neck with the needle in her palm, healing an equal amount to the **Blood Count**.

- _2s Cooldown_

_Secondary Passive Effect;_ Passively heal at a rate of **2h/s** after not taking damage for **3 Seconds** and also have a **10% Lifesteal** from all sources of basekit damage _(Abilities/Attacks)_. All decimals are rounded up.

### `Secondary Passive:` `Old Wounds`

All of Kathy’s abilities will apply **Stitches**, which are used to trigger unique effects with her **Suture** ability.

### `Tertiary Passive:` `Stridor`

All natural **Survivor** sounds _(Running, Breathing, Panting, Grunts of Pain)_ are amplified by **50%** for Kathy.

### `AB1/Z:` `Last Breath`

Three tokens. On use, spend a token and reach forward with her left hand, fading out of view before appearing again 5~7 studs ahead, allowing a **1.5 Second** window to use another token to fade forward once more. She has the ability to use a **Standard Attack** during this window as well, dealing **10 Extra Damage** and counting as a **Sporadic Attack**. Successful Sporadic Attacks will inflict _**2 Stitches**_ to the **Survivor** hit and Kathy will incur a **1 Second Fatigue** afterwards, while failing to use an attack will incur a **2 Second Base Fatigue.** A **Sporadic Attack** will add an extra **1 Second** to the total incurred **Fatigue.** Fatigue can be avoided by using all available  tokens, but will lock her out of using a Standard Attack for **2 Seconds.**

_Fatigue Numbers;_

- _Base Fatigue: 2 Seconds_
- _Chain Fades: +0.5 Seconds per fade_
- _Sporadic Attack Penalty: +1 Second_

Any **Survivors** within **20 Studs** of Kathy when she uses the final available token in a chain are afflicted with [**Oblivious**](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌") and [**Exhausted**](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌") for **10 Seconds.**

Can only use _Sporadicity_ when all tokens are present, otherwise on cooldown until all tokens are recharged.

- _6s Recharge Cooldown_

### `AB2/X:` `Suture`

On use, Kathy swings her suturing scissors ahead in a flash; slashing it ahead of her in a range of 6 Studs and a 80° cone, dealing **10 Damage** and inflicting **Bleeding I** for **10 Seconds** to all hit.

If the afflicted **Survivors** hit had **Stitches**, remove all stacks to deal **10 Base Damage + 5 Damage per stack**. Additionally, depending on how many stacks were present on-hit, also apply the following effects:

- _**2+ Stacks:** Mangled for 30 Seconds_
- _**3+ Stacks:** Bleeding I → Bleeding II for 10 Seconds & Deep Wounds_
- _**4+ Stacks:** 25% Fragility for 15 Seconds_
- _**5+ Stacks:** Fatal Wounds_
- _**6+ Stacks:** Bleeding II → Hemorrhaged for 15 Seconds_
- _**7+ Stacks:** Incapacitated for 30 Seconds_

Afterwards, apply **1 Stack** of **Stitches.**

- _10s Cooldown_

### `AB3/C:` `Intravasation`

Kathy spasms rapidly before whipping her left arm forward; sending one of the syringes in her arm towards the cursor. Upon hitting a **Survivor**, it will stick into them, dealing an instant **15 Damage** plus **10 Additional Damage** over **5 Seconds**, additionally inflicting **Anaphylaxis** for **10 Seconds** and **1 Stitches.** Will consume all available **Blood Count** up to **500** to deal extra damage; adding **+5 Damage** to the additional damage this ability deals for every **50 Blood** for a max cap of **60 Over-Time Damage.**

Upon reducing a Survivor’s health down to **1**, cleanse all negative effects afflicted by this ability and negate any damage originating from this ability or it’s effects that would bring the Survivor’s health below 1.

- _15s Cooldown_

### `AB3/V:` `Bloodlet`

Kathy slices her arm, opening a large gash in her pale skin as she begins to drain her blood, incurring a **20% Hinder** and taking rapid damage equal to **10%** of her **Max HP** over the course of **3 Seconds.** Afterwards, **cleanse** all **ailments** currently afflicting herself and gain **10% Haste** for **5 Seconds.**

- _40s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Exhaust Survivors 500 times with Last Breath_
- _Achievement 2 - Burst 1,000 Stacks of Stitches Using Suture_
- _Achievement 3 - Reduce Survivors HP to 1 using Intravasation 150 times_
- _Achievement 4 - Cleanse 750 Ailments using Bloodlet_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 250 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Seamstress** -_ Skin inspired by the **Seamstress** from the **Risk of Rain 2 Mod** and **The Barber** from **Limbus Company.**
cards.name: The Nurse

cards.desc:
# **The Shade**

## _"It was darker than black. - Unknown Writer"_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `Unknown`
`Birthdate:` `Unknown (November 19th, 2017 Discovery Date)`
`Origin:` `Unknown`
`Gender:` `None`

An entity devoid of colour, donning a full, pitch black cloak with a dark fog emanating from it’s waist cape. It’s only notable feature outside of this is it’s glowing white eyes.

It possesses sharp, long claws that occasionally have droplets of darkness falling from the tips of them.

Body beneath the cloak is made of a raging darkness, swirling with a sinister dark black; a whirlpool of suffering and emptiness in the centre of it’s chest.

_"Lore Excerpt"_

## **Overview**

The Shade is a simple and effective stealth killer, having many different options for stealth, information, tracking, _and_ chase! Although it’s walkspeed and damage is nothing very spectacular, it more than makes up for them in it’s mobility and lethality with Unto Sin. This makes Shade a terrifying killer to face, and not difficult to learn; although it’s techs may take time to get used to and/or learn.

Shade excels in drawing out matches and building themselves up, specializing in picking Survivors off but suffering in prolonged and open fights outside of Unto Sin.

`Idle Animation:` Slowly floats up and down, bobbing it’s head slowly as it does do.

`Moving Animation:` Hovering just above the ground, leaning forward as it moves.

`Weapon - The Fangs:` Sharp claws of pure black, utilised by the Shade to maul and lacerate it’s victims.

`Standard Attack Animation:` _Raise it’s left hand from beneath it’s cloak, being a pure black, before slashing in front of it diagonally with a red slash._

`Requiem Kill Animation:` _The Shade materialised before the Survivor, its cloak swirling outward as it consumes the Survivor; vanishing, engulfed in darkness. Lost in a void of absolute blackness, the Survivor stumbles blindly, tormented by fleeting visions. Panic swelled within them._

_Suddenly, the Shade materialised before them. A searing pain erupted in their throat as they find their throat slit, claw marks perforating through. Blood gurgled from the wound before the Survivor collapsed to the ground, life ebbing away._

_The Survivor's body now reappears on the map, drained of blood, completely pale._

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Great Stealth Options
\+Great Mobility with Cloak, The Countless, & Unto Sin
\+Blackouts
\+Good Status Effect Application
\+Good Location Info with The Countless
\+Good Chase Potential

\-Slow Walkspeed
\-Low Health
\-Low Base Standard Attack Damage
\-Long Cooldowns
\-Little Lethality outside of Unto Sin
\-Very difficult to land Bind with The Countless

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Stealth`
- `Difficulty: 3/5 - Advanced`
- `Health: 45,000`
- `Walk-Speed: 24`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 86`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 40`
- `Attack Cooldown: 1.5`

## **Obtainment**

- _Own_ [_Into the Unknown_](https://trello.com/c/Kowp6KN2/400-into-the-unknown-free-tutorial "‌")

## **Loadout**

[_**The Shade’s Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/aHsu3Oza/350-shade "‌")

### **Perks**

_**Shadowborn [2 Points]**_ | _“It’s hatred for the light drives it’s rage.”_
Upon being **Blinded** or **Stunned** by any means, reduce it’s duration by **25%/37.5%/50%**, then gain **Concealed** and **5%/7.5%/10% Haste** for **6 Seconds**, then go on cooldown for **60 Seconds.**

- Gain **Concealed** and **Haste** regardless of if the Perk is on cooldown.

_**Fallen Veil [2 Points]**_ | _“It hungers to drive out the light by any means necessary.”_
**Block all Objectives** for **15 Seconds** and cause a **20 Second Blackout** any time a **Main Objective** is completed.

- **Blocked Objectives** cannot be interacted with by **Survivors.**

_**Dark Curtain [2 Points]**_ | _“Hope is shrouded in darkness as it draws a curtain call for the living’s escape.”_
After **vaulting** a window or designated vault location, **block** that vault for **8/12/16** **Seconds.**

- **Blocked Vaults** cannot be vaulted by **Survivors.**
- Increase **Vaulting Speed** by **5%/10%/15%.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Shroud of Erebus**_ | After not using an **Ability** or a **Standard Attack** for **10 Seconds**, gain **Concealed** until one of the two are used.

- After using an attack that deals damage while having **Concealed** from this perk _(Or after meeting the condition while having Concealed)_, inflict **Darkness** on-hit for **10 Seconds.**

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _**Darkness** -_ Targets suffering from Darkness suffer from Oblivious, have their vision set to **30 Studs**, and only see a pitch black darkness past that range.
- _**Bleed**_ - Targets suffering from **Bleed** will take **1 Damage** per tick. Does not damage at or below **10 HP.** For each tier above 1, will halve the amount of time between each tick, starting from **1 second.**

### `Passive:` `Cloak`

_Active Ability:_ On use, swipe your cloak over yourself and become invisible _(0.4s Animation)_. Move at **34 Walkspeed** while cloaked.

You are concealed and unable to be seen while cloaked, but have a noticeable, reverberating footfall audio in a **15 Stud Radius** and have an aura of quiet whispers in a **20 Stud radius** around you that both grow louder the closer you are to Survivors.

You can perform damage/destroy actions while cloaked.

While cloaked, you can perform a **Standard Attack** to transform it into a **Special Attack** that will instantly uncloak you; thrusting forward with both claws to deliver a **40 Damage** thrust that also inflicts **Darkness** and **Bleed** for **5 Seconds.** Afterwards, incur a **3s Attack Cooldown Period.**

- _20s Ambush Strike Cooldown_

Hold down RMB to uncloak, becoming more visible as you hold it down as you float upwards, a distorted rising tone playing as you grow closer to being uncloaked. You move with at **10 Walkspeed** while uncloaking. Upon finishing an uncloak, release a burst of black fog around you and let out a echoing, warbled screech that can be heard around the entire map. _(1.4s to fully uncloak)_. Upon uncloaking, you gain **+50% Haste** for **1 Second.**

### `AB1/Z:` `Otherworldly Shroud`

Lean forward, grabbing both ends of your cloak before spinning up into the air, heavily saturating all Survivor’s screens as you spread your arms out to each side of you; releasing a burst of darkness that shrouds the entire map in darkness; causing a **20 Second Blackout.**

- _60s Cooldown_

### `AB2/X:` `Shaded Step`

On use, slow yourself down to **22 Walkspeed** and send forward a shadow of yourself at a speed of **30 Studs/s.** Click to confirm, or until it reaches max range, and upon confirming; Blink forward (_35 Studs Max Range)_, stomping your foot down where you blinked to; sending black fog all around you. Gain **10% Haste** for **3 Seconds** on arrival and afflict all **Survivors** within **20 Studs** with **Darkness** for **10 Seconds.**

- _12s Cooldown_

### `AB3/C:` `The Countless`

Swing your left claw out to your side before thrusting it up into the air; sending a column of darkness into the sky and summoning **5 Clones** of yourself without your cloak, one each at a random available spawnpoint(s) within **200 Studs** of you for **45 Seconds**, which have unique animations. They hunch over, arms hanging out in front of them, moving with slow, heavy steps _(26 Walkspeed)_ towards the closest nearby **Survivor(s).** Only one clone can target a **Survivor** at a time.

If a clone reaches a **Survivor** and successfully attacks them by performing a heavy overhead swing with their claws, chaining the Survivor down with chains of pure darkness for **5 Seconds** and dealing **60 Damage.** The binded Survivor is highlighted while they are binded and trigger **Killer Instinct.** The binds will be immediately broken if the Survivor takes any damage from you.

These clones are highlighted to you at all times, and can be swapped with by using **Shaded Step** while looking at one, selecting it by pressing [AB2] and then pressing LMB. Swapping will halve the cooldown of **Shaded Step.**

- _60s Cooldown_

### `AB4/V:` `Unto Sin`

Can store up to **5,000 “Abyssal Rage”**, collecting both damage dealt and taken.

- _Damage Dealt: DamageDealt(10) = Charge Added_
- _Damage Taken: DamageTaken(0.5) = Charge Added_

Usable at any charged amount.

On use, rip off your cloak and screech into the sky; causing shockwaves to ripple out across the map and shaking Survivor’s screens, increasing in intensity corresponding to proximity. The screech can be heard map-wide. You now stand and move on all fours, looking around frantically. Your distorted voice and be heard panting heavily as you move.

In this state, you are perpetually afflicted with **Helpless** and gain the buffs listed below;

- _Haste_
- _Concealed_
- _Aura-Reading on Survivors within **100 Studs**_
- _Attack Slowdown Immunity_
- _Reduced Attack Cooldown_
- _2 Second On-Hit Bleeding & Darkness_

The effects gained during this are increased in power corresponding to how much this ability has been charged;

- _Base Duration: 10 Seconds_
  - _+1 Second per 200 Charge (Up to +25)_
- _Base Attack Damage: 5 Damage_
  - _+1 Damage per 1,000 Charge (Up to +5)_
- _Base Attack Cooldown: 1.25 Second_
  - _-0.1 Cooldown per 1,000 Charge (Up to -0.5)_
- _Base Haste: 15% Haste_
  - _+1% Haste per 150 Charge (Up to +33%)_
- _On-Hit Status Duration: 2 Seconds_
  - _+1 Second per 1,250 Charge (Up to +4)_

Cannot be charged while on cooldown.

- _80s Cooldown after duration ends_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Land 1,500 Ambush or Cloaked Strikes_
- _Achievement 2 - Down 200 Survivors during Otherworldly Shroud_
- _Achievement 3 - Bind 50 Survivors with The Countless_
- _Achievement 4 - Inflict an active period of 60+ Seconds of Darkness on a single Survivor_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 250 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Classic** - Shade with classic Roblox game style, custom animation, and SFX._
cards.name: The Shade

cards.desc:
# **Saylor Lüdeke**

## _"RAISE YOUR OARS, MEN."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `24`
`Birthdate:` `May 17th`
`Origin:` `German`
`Gender:` `Cis Female`

Saylor is a tall, broad-shouldered woman with a white wife-beater top spotted in dust and grime. She wears a blue linen wrap around her waist, darkened with grime.
She has deep black, fluffy hair sticking out from underneath her hat and vibrant blue eyes. She has a blank face idly, not showing much emotion.
On her back is a large Anchor attached to a long line of rope wrapped around a pulley.
She has a large pale blue Zephyr tattoo down her right arm and an Anchor with an Anchor attached to it’s pulley, slack rope behind it.
She also dons a dirty black Captain hat on her head.

_"Lore Excerpt"_

## **Overview**

Saylor is a great character with the ability to scale well passively over time, becoming extremely powerful late-game alongside her damage potential and repair speed potential; gaining the ability to power through objectives if she is left to their devices.

`Idle Animation:` After 3 seconds, crosses her arms and begins to tap her left foot. After 5 seconds, she takes out her anchor and places it on the ground, leaning against it on her right side.

`Walking Animation:` Default.

`Sprinting Animation:` Default.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Late Scaling Potential
\+Passive Repair Speed Increases
\+Escape Potential with Zephyr Active
\+Great Ability Damage
\+Ability Healing
\+Cooldown Reduction

±Aim Reliant Ability

\-Long Cooldowns
\-Movement Locked when using Blood and Thunder

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Operator`
- `Sub-Archetype: Confrontational`
- `Difficulty: 3/5 - Advanced`
- `Health: 100`
- `Stamina: 8`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.75`

## **Obtainment**

- _$1,200 Veiled Coins_

## **Loadout**

### _Mentioned_ [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌"):

Status Effects that appear within this Character’s Kit.

- _Haste_ - Movement Speed increase. Listed as a % when present.
- _Exhausted_ - Disables the use of Exhaustion Perks. While Exhausted, Survivors will pant heavily.

### **Perks**

_**Tide Over [2 Points]**_ | _“This’ll have to do for now.“_
Every **1%** of health lost will grant **+0.1%/+0.15%/+0.2% Repair Speed.**
The last bullet in a **Gun** will deal **+100% Damage**.

_**Fair Winds and Following Seas [3 Points]**_ | _“Lady luck is on your side, granting you fair winds and following seas.“_
Increases your base luck when opening **Crates** by **+15%/+30%/+45%** and grant a **50% Chance** to have a **Refraction** in each **Refraction Slot**.

_**Sailor’s Delight [4 Points]**_ | _“Red Sky at night, sailor’s delight.“_
Increases the base amount of healing you receive by **+33%/+66%/+100%.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Fata Morgana**_ | _“There the sea flows, right across the horizon.“_
After contributing **30+ Charges** to an Objective and working on an Objective, press the **Active Perk Ability** key to create a mirage of yourself working on the Objective for **25 Seconds.** The mirage is hazy and smoky up close. After placing a mirage, this perk resets the Charge Requirement.
If the Killer swings at a mirage, immediately gain **+15% Haste** for **3 Seconds** and **+20% Repair Speed** for **50 Seconds.**

### `Passive:` `Zephyr`

Every **1 Charge** contributed to Objectives will grant **1 Zephyr Stack**. Each stack of **Zephyr** will grant **+0.25% Haste.**
Zephyr Stacks will decay at a rate of **4 Stacks/s** after not gaining new stacks for **4 Seconds.**
Every **1% Haste** above normal movement speed grants **+2% Repair Speed.**

Press the **Passive Ability** key to consume all **Zephyr Stacks** and gain +**1% Haste** for every stack consumed and go into the **Zephyr State**, which lasts for **1 Second.** After the duration expires, gain **Exhausted** for **75 Seconds.**

- _120s Cooldown_

### `AB1/Q:` `Blood and Thunder`

On use, Saylor grabs her Anchor with one hand and thrusts it forward; sending it barrelling ahead towards the cursor. On hit, deal **250 Damage. Stun** for **1 Second**, and send out **Zephyrs** towards any **Enemy** behind the originally hit enemy in a **75° Cone** with **50%** of the Original Damage and stun for **50%** the original Stun Duration. _(2x Damage and Stun Duration on Entities)_
After the Anchor hits, Saylor flips the pulley switch to retract the Anchor swiftly.

Each successful hit using **Blood and Thunder** grants **1 Stack** _(Including Zephyr Hits)_. Each stack grants the following effects:

- _+1% Blood and Thunder Damage_
- _-0.25% Blood and Thunder Cooldown (Caps at -50% CDR)_
- _+0.1% Repair Speed_
- _+0.01% Haste Gained by Passive’s Stacks_

Reeling in and throwing out plays a crossing gate bell sound with a chain pulling in/out. On-hit sound plays a deep horn sound effect, and Zephyr’s play a wind whooshing sound accompanied by a high-wind impact sound.

Hits on **Entities** refund **50%** of the **Ability Cooldown.**
Each **Charge** contributed to an **Objective** lowers the cooldown by **1 Second.**
Every second spent in **Chase** lowers the cooldown by **1 Second.**

- _90s Cooldown_

### `AB2/E:` `Flog`

Saylor whips the rope on her hip forward, hitting every enemy in a 60° cone ahead of her, dealing **40 Damage** and healing for **10HP** on-hit against Killers and **3HP** for each entity hit.

Every enemy hit will incur a **20% Hinder** and **40% Weakness** for **6 Seconds.**

- _25s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `Rally`

Saylor lets out a booming yell, motivating nearby Survivors and consuming **50%** of her **Zephyr** stacks to buff herself and her nearby Survivors for **10 Seconds**, granting the following effects;

- _+2% Repair Speed per stack_
- _+1% Haste per stack_
- _+1% Power per stack_
- _+5% Reload Speed per stack_
- _+2.5% Fire Rate per stack_
- _Highlight All Enemies within 35 Studs_

Afterwards, all effected Survivors gain **Exhausted** for **1(Haste%x) Seconds.**

- _60s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Gain a total of 2,000 Zephyr Stacks_
- _Achievement 2 - Gain a total of 1,000 Blood and Thunder Stacks_
- _Achievement 3 - Heal 2,500 Health Using Flog_
- _Achievement 4 - Consume 1,000 Zephyr Stacks using Rally_
- _Achievement 3 - Escape 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] The Lash / Undeniable** - Jacob Lash is an a\*\*\*\**e._
  ![Lash\_Render.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/6701ab9989e13af2befd169b/attachments/68158c46eebefb716d7d71e8/download/Lash_Render.png)
cards.name: Saylor Lüdeke

cards.desc:
# **Alexander Glynn II**

## _"Not a soul is seated within my stalls;                                                            ...therein I perform before a dead audience, my art a hollow echo in this empty space.                                My voice lost in the silence, my passion unrequited."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `18`
`Birthdate:` `May 11th`
`Origin:` `Unknown`
`Gender:` `Non-Binary`

Wears a full black and white checker-patterned Jesters outfit, with black arm sleeves and white gloves. Also dons a white bow from their collar, with a jade button in the middle of it.

As for their face, they wear a two-faced black & white mask, it’s shape reminiscent of a plague doctor. With this, they also wear a large two-horned jester cap with a similar black and white checker pattern, and large white and black fur balls on the ends of the horns.

_For reference, use PESTRiCA_R on Twitter and “Nihil” Roland from Library of Ruina as bases to visualise._

_"A lone Jester stands atop his stage, enacting it’s silent play._

_Each gesture, each word of it’s carefully crafted script, delivered with utmost focus and passion._

_All for an audience that will not applaud, cannot appreciate; a dead audience._

_That is.. until a new script arrives, a chance to find it’s living audience; a break from the hollow projector's static."_

## **Overview**

Alexander is a very unique Survivor, having a powerful passive with a huge payoff for meeting it’s activation requirements but at the same time being relatively difficult to fill. On top of this, they also have a great escape & traversal tool; being able to teleport to a random location on the map at the cost of health.

This together gives Alexander an amazing loadout for completing objectives! Although they may be risky, _Silent Orchestra_ is an amazing tool even in chase, as Alexander has both Concealed and Silenced during it.

`Idle Animation:` Standing upright, breathing in and out. After idle for 5+ seconds, stand on one leg with the other foot on their other lower leg and pull out a white, star-speckled fan and over their face.

`Walking Animation:` Walks forward robotically, stepping forward with each leg and cycling them together, arms going out in front of them alternating as well. _(Alike “Toy” Animation Pack)_

`Sprinting Animation:` Skips forward, jumping slightly with each step.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Insane Potential for Objective Completion
\+Great Stealth Tools
\+Great Escape & Traversal Tools

\-Health Sacrifice to use Abilities
\-Passive Takes Time to Charge
\-Slow Stamina Regen
\-Low Base Health

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Operator`
- `Sub-Archetype: Technical`
- `Difficulty: 4/5`
- `Health: 175`
- `Stamina: 10`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.6`

## **Obtainment**

- _Claim_ [_Dead Audience_](https://trello.com/c/ufyOXskd/215-dead-audience "‌") Achievement

## **Loadout**

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _Concealed_ - Conceals all actions and blocks all Aura-reading. Also applies the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.
- _Silenced_ - Silences footsteps, Loud Noise Notifications, and all ambient noises _(Ambient Killer Noises, Survivor Breathing, & Grunts of Pain)._
- _Achromat_ - Stacking status, up to **7.** Stacks can be removed by downing Survivors. The following effects will take place at certain stack amounts:
  - **1+ Stacks:** Apply a light vignette filter and darken vision, saturating and reducing the brightness of all colors. Increases in strength the more stacks that are applied.
  - **2+ Stacks:** Using an ability will **Seal** it for **6 Seconds**, restricting usage and not allowing it’s cooldown to count down while sealed.
  - **3+ Stacks:** Incur a passive **10% Fragility.**
  - **4+ Stacks:** **Seal** duration is increased to **10 Seconds.**
  - **5+ Stacks:** **Nullify** all sources of **Distortion.**
  - **6+ Stacks:** **Stuns** and all **negative status effects** have their duration increased by **50%** and reduce the duration of **positive effects** by **50%.** Now nullify all sources of **Haste, Silenced,** and **Distortion.**
  - **7 Stacks:** Take **10% Max HP** as damage, **Stun** self, gain **Deafened**, and incur the **unique blindness** from **Starstruck** for **5 Seconds**, then remove all stacks.

### **Perks**

_**Empty Court [3 Points]**_ | _“The hollow court the Jester serves, with a fleeting loyalty~“_
For every Survivor **Downed**, this Perk gains a **Token.**

- Every **Token** grants a stackable **+1%/2%/3% Action Proficiency.**

_**Fading Memories [4 Points]**_ | _“They cannot seem to recall anything from their past, like a blurry photograph.“_
Your **Shadow Trails** last **75%/60%/45%** as long.

_**Agony of the Deprived [4 Points]**_ | _“For what is a Jester without it’s script?“_
Upon entering the **Injured State**, mark the nearest living Survivor to you until you are **Healthy.**
If either of you complete a **Healing Action** on one or the other, you will both gain the following effects:

- While within **44 Studs** of the marked Survivor, both of you gain a **+5%/7.5%/10% Haste.**

This effect will persist until one of you are **downed**, wherein the mark will reset.

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Dead Audience**_ | _“The Jester's audience returns for one more play.“_
Nullifies all other sources of **Haste** except for **On-Hit Haste.**

For every **Entity** or **Survivor** killed; this Perk gains **Tokens.**

- **Tier I & II Entities** grant **1 Token.**
- **Tier III & IV Entities** grant **2 Tokens.**
- **Dead Survivors** grant **3 Token.**
  - Each **Token** accumulated grants a permanent +**0.2% Haste.**
  - Lose **half** of **Tokens** accumulated upon being **Downed.**

### `Passive:` `Silent Orchestra`

Performing **Solo Repair Actions,** **Self-Healing Actions**, and being in **Chase** will fill up the _“Silent Orchestra”_ meter. Each **Charge** contributed and second chased will add one **Charge** to this passive, which requires **90 Charges** to fill.

Once it is full, it gives Alexander the ability to perform the _Silent Orchestra_, which will grant them the following effects for **60 Seconds:**

- **+75% Objective Proficiency _(Only while working Solo)_**
- **Continuous Skill Checks**
- **+20% Skill Check Rotation Speed**
- **+15% Great Skill Check Success Zone**
- **No Good Skill Check Success Zone**
- **Concealed**
- **Silenced**
- **Mutes _all_ Audio for other players _(Killer & Survivors)_ when within 100 Studs of Alexander _(Audio Fades away when within radius)_**
- **Unable to be targeted by Entities**

To perform _Silent Orchestra_, Alexander must crouch down and use the _Active Ability_ button while the ability is charged.

After the effect ends, the charge meter will revert back to **0%.**

_Cosmetic Effect:_ All blood Alexander spills is white and starry.

### `AB1/Q:` `Starstruck`

Alexander pulls our their runic knife, holding their hand out in front of them before slicing the palm of of their other hand and swiping forward; sending a torrent of their starry ichor ahead, coating the bodies of any enemies hit by the blood. Upon being coated, those targets are **blinded** and **afflicted** with a **myriad of effects**, the blinding effect appearing as a flowing, starry effect that takes over their screen. Effected targets also incur the following effects;

- _Unique Blindness for 2 Seconds_
- _Deafened & Dazed for 3 Seconds; Audio muffled by a mystical, flowing sound_
- _10% Fragility for 4 Seconds_
- _15% Weakness for 5 Seconds_
- _Helpless for 6 Seconds_
- _1 Stack of “Achromat”_

Alexander sacrifices **10% Current HP** to use this ability.

- _25s Cooldown_

### `AB2/E:` `Melody of Silence`

Toggle-able. Alexander pulls out their runic knife, stabbing it into their heart. Bloodied, starry scores begin to leak out of their heart, floating through the air around them as they gain a ramping **+1% Haste** per second alongside **Silenced**, with the haste capping out at **+15%** after **15 Seconds.**

During this, Alexander loses **1% Max HP/s.** Upon toggling off, Alexander rips the knife back out and instantly loses all effects.

- _1s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `Curtain Call`

On use, Alexander pulls out a runic, spiral knife with white, glowing fissures on it’s body, proceeding to stab themselves with it in the heart; dealing **35% Current Health** in damage to themselves before letting go and raising their arms upwards for; lights beaming down behind them before swinging their arms to cross them as they bow down; extending both arms behind them while an invisible audience claps. After the animation ends, Alexander vanishes in a large poof of black smoke and white glitter, with a variety of starry glints, with black curtains closing in on the player’s screen.

After this, the player’s screen returns as the curtains open; Alexander now reappearing in a new location in another poof of black smoke and white glitter and with the knife missing.

The target priority for this ability is somewhere on the map within **30 Studs** of a **Generator.**

_Animation takes **5 Seconds** to complete._

- _90s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Perform Silent Orchestra 50 Times_
- _Achievement 2 - Trigger Achromat’s Max Stack Effect 50 Times_
- _Achievement 3 - Escape Chase using Melody of Silence 200 Times_
- _Achievement 4 - Escape Chase using Curtain Call 100 Times_
- _Achievement 5 - Win 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] N/A** - Nothing for now._
cards.name: Alexander Glynn II

cards.desc:
# **Virgil**

## _"Through me is the way to the city of woe; through me the way to the eternal pain. I have seen these paths before, and those I loved have walked them without me. What light remains when all around is shadow?_

## _But even in the deepest darkness, a single ember can glow. And so, I search. A fool's errand, perhaps, but I will search nonetheless."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `Unknown`
`Birthdate:` `September 29th`
`Origin:` `Unknown`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

A scruffy, scarred man with a permanent scowl. His skin seems to be coated in ash, only small bits of his relatively darkened skin poking through.
His eyes are bright, vibrant red and have eye-bags right underneath.
A large, deep scar runs down diagonally down his face, passing through his eyes and over his nose. A silver rod earring is on his left ear.
His hair itself is short and an ashy grey silver.
He dons a black cloak with a cowl that covers his body and head, the main body of it splitting around his mid-section to show the inner parts of his legs. The cloak is attached to his shoulder by a layered pauldron on his right shoulder.
Underneath the cloak, he wears a tattered, grey two-piece suit and long grey pants. Alongside this, he wears black dress shoes.
His eyes shine from behind the cowl, and the earring can be seen through it as the cowl itself is wide enough to see inside and the features of his head.

_"A rugged wanderer, condemned to his own fate, he witnessed those around him fall one by one, a tragic spectacle he was powerless to prevent. He possessed overwhelming power, more than enough to protect them, yet he failed. Not through weakness, but through his own folly, the opportunities missed, the moments he hesitated, a fatal oversight; his own foolishness catching up to him. With each loss, the weight of his failure deepened, further detaching him from his human ego. Now, he walks this path both revered and feared, an unfortunate soul avoided by others, their whispers clinging to him like shadows._

_Virgil._

_The name itself tastes of ash, a fitting epithet for a man whose skin seems permanently dusted with the remnants of countless pyres. His scowl is a constant fixture, a grim mask hiding the hollow ache within. Crimson eyes, vibrant yet haunted, peer out from beneath the weight of sleepless nights and the deep gash that bisects his face, a jagged reminder of battles fought and lost. The silver rod in his ear, a single defiant spark against the encroaching darkness, is a relic of a life he can no longer fully recall; wielding such a bright blade, what would-be a beacon for others, only shines emptily to those who are already lost, and he yet again finds himself is alone in this unending abyss.”_

## **Overview**

Virgil is a very unique Survivor, encouraging direct confrontation with the Killer on purpose; and discouraging performing objectives. Instead, he serves as an obstacle for the Killer, a direct enemy that they must fight. Virgil boasts an insane amount of health and stamina, albeit suffering from slow stamina regeneration, but he more than makes up for it with his unique weapon; Gladius. It deals a large amount of damage and can seriously hurt the Killers, so they must play fairly reserved while facing a Virgil, and not let him out-heal the damage they dish out.

All of this combined makes Virgil a very difficult Survivor to play, but extremely rewarding if played correctly, and could easily lead your team to victory.

`Idle Animation:` He stands, breathing up and down; holding his blazing sword at his right side while gazing downwards; a red glint shining from his eyes behind the cowl.
`Walking Animation:` He walks with both hands steady at his sides, legs alternating in front of him.
`Sprinting Animation:` He runs forward with steadiness, arm wielding his Gladius steady at his side while his other arm swings up and down.
`Spawn Animation:` Appears on the map kneeling down, his gladius embedded into the ground. He then gets up, ripping it out of the ground before swinging it, resting it at his side.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Extremely High HP
\+Extremely High Stamina
\+Huge Damage Potential
\+Massive Disruption
\+Lifesteal
\+Passive Regen
\+Basekit Haste
\+Basekit Power
\+Immune to Burn Status
\+Hinder is half-effective
\+Scorn Status Effect Deals % DMG

±Neutral

\-Skill Floor
\-Can take Huge Burst Damage due to High Fragility %
\-Restricted to Melee Range
\-Less Effective against Ranged Killers
\-Restricted to only using Gladius Weapon
\-Cannot Use Items
\-Horrible Repair Speed
\-_Only_ Healing Source is Lifesteal and Passive Regeneration
\-Cannot Gain Resistance, Overhealth, or Endurance
\-Less time to be Rescued

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Confrontational`
- `Difficulty: 5/5`
- `Health: 300`
- `Stamina: 12`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.75`

## **Obtainment**

- _Claim_ [_Nine Circles_](https://trello.com/c/QFdpzBg8/138-nine-circles "‌") Achievement

## **Loadout**

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _Burn **-**_ Targets suffering from **Burn** will take **2 Damage/s.**
- _Scorn_ - Targets suffering from **Scorn** will take **X%** of **Max HP** as damage after **10 Seconds.** This has a special effect as it grows closer to bursting, with a ring of ash revolving around them, growing larger and brighter before reaching a critical point with a glowing orange effect before bursting into an explosion of slag and fire. _(x = stack count)_

### **Perks**

_**The Oath [3 Points]**_ | _“You’ve taken an oath to not let your failures catch up to you once more.“_
While **Healthy** and healing a **Downed Survivor**, you can use the **Active Perk Ability** button to apply the following effects:

- Trade **50% Max HP** to instantly recover the Downed Survivor to **50% Max HP.**

Afterwards, you incur the **Broken** Status for **80/70/60 Seconds** and become the **Fixation** if you weren’t already.

_**Sanctuary [2 Points]**_ | _“I won't let them take you; this shall be your Sanctuary.”_
Upon being **Recovered**, you grant the **Rescuer** _Grace_ for **6/8/10 Seconds.**

_**Blazing Gambit [4 Points]**_ | _“It's now or never.“_
Upon taking **fatal damage**, **Negate** all damage taken and gain a **+5%/10%/15%** **Haste** for **4 Seconds.**
Afterwards, this Perk deactivates.
_Re-activates once the Exit is opened._

### **Mastery Perk**

_**The Leviathan**_ | _“The tide will turn; at all costs.“_
The following effects apply to you while **Injured** and have no **Ticks** left:

- **Increases** your **Action Speeds** for _Vaulting, Wedging, Undoing, Blessing, Re-inscribing,_ and _Unlocking_ by **15%.**
- **Reduces** your **Action Speeds** for _Repairing, Healing,_ and _Opening_ by **15%.**
- **Permanently** gain **+15%** **Damage**.
- **HP** is capped at **40%.**

### `Passive A:` `The Inferno` _“The consuming fires.”_

_Only one player may have Virgil equipped at a time._

Virgil suffers from the following effects:

- Virgil cannot equip/pick up **any** weapons.
- Virgil cannot equip/pick up **any** items or equipment.
- Virgil has an innate **50% Reduction** in **Repair Speed.**
- Virgil cannot be healed by teammates or perform self-healing actions.
- Virgil cannot gain **Resistance, Overhealth, or Endurance.**
- Virgil’s **Bleed-Out Timer** is **reduced** to **180 Seconds.**

Virgil benefits from the following effects:

- Virgil is **Immune** to **Burn Damage.**
- While afflicted by **Burn**, Virgil deals **10% More Damage.**
- **Hinder** is only **50%** as effective. _(Does not effect duration.)_

### `Passive B:` `The Trail` _“Even in the ashes, a spark of life remains.”_

Virgil passively regenerates his HP at a rate of **2hp/s** after not taking damage for **9+ Seconds.**

Virgil has a passive **25% Lifesteal.** This is reduced to **5%** when dealing damage to **Tier III Entities** and below.

### `Passive C:` `The Dying Light`

Virgil wields a special weapon dubbed the _“Gladius,”_ a roughly forged, scorching orange gladius blade with a hilt composed of ash.

The _Gladius_ has the following stats:

- _125 Damage_
- _Inf. Durability_
- _Short Range_
- _1 Stamina Spent on-swing_
- _0.7s Swing Cooldown_
- _1.2s Combo Cooldown_

When attacking with the _Gladius_, it has a three-stage attack pattern:

- _Left-Facing Diagonal Slash, Wide Horizontal Slash, Forward Thrust._

The third attack will inflict **1 Stack** of _**Scorn.**_

### `AB1/Q:` `The Nine Circles`

A % displays above this ability’s icon. Deal damage to fill this ability’s meter. Requires **1,500 Damage** to fill to **100%.** After ability duration ends, go on cooldown. Cannot fill while on cooldown.

On use, a swirling orange energy begins to erupt around Virgil, transitioning into a bloodied red energy before Virgil swings Gladius to the side, text appearing above him displaying _“The Nine Circles open...”_; transforming it into a longer, blood-red blade as the energy engulfs him, transforming his cloak into a blood-red cloak and his cowl into a floating crown of blood. His Gladius now lets of wisps of red around it, radiating with a potent energy.

The following positive effects apply passively to Virgil:

- **+10% Haste**
- **120% Lifesteal**
- **Aura-reading on all Enemies**

The following negative effects apply passively to Virgil:

- **HP Decays at a rate of 5hp/s after not dealing damage for 2 Seconds**
- **20% Fragility**

The duration of _The Nine Circles_ is **45 Seconds.**
All **Entity Kills** during _The Nine Circles_ will extend it’s duration by **2 Seconds.**

Additionally, in this form; Gladius has different stats and abilities.

The _Gladius_' new stats are as follows:

- _185 Damage_
- _Slightly Increased Short Range_
- _1 Stamina Spent on-swing_
- _0.7s Swing Cooldown_
- _1s Combo Cooldown_

When attacking with the _Nine Circles Gladius_, it has a three-stage attack pattern:

- _Forward Left Stab, Forward Right Stab, Wide Circular Slash with a follow-up Horizontal Dash-Slash._

The third attack inflicts **2 Stacks** of **Scorn.**

- _1,500 Damage Req._
- _160s Cooldown (80s Cooldown on-spawn)_

### `AB2/E:` `Vulcan's Tear`

Virgil raises Gladius up, before quickly swinging it down; readying it at his side for a split moment before thrusting forward; blinking past any and all enemies; a large circular, blazing slash effect filling the area in-between; dealing an instant **240 Damage** and inflicting **3 Stacks** of **Scorn** to all enemies. _(Double the stacks on Entities.)_

Flavour text appears above Virgil in a deep, glowing orange displaying _“Pierce the veil.”_

- _40s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `The Open Path`

Virgil places his free hand onto the blade of _Gladius_, pulling it outwards as it transforms into a large, blood-red, crimson flaming spear; raising it upwards as text above his head displays _“I will not forget, and I shall use this blade...”_ before throwing it forward; piercing through all enemies in the way, dealing **500 Damage** and inflicting **5 Stacks** of **Scorn.**

Afterwards, Virgil will appear above the enemy hit with the highest amount of **HP** sideways in the air; his _Gladius_ raised above him and text above him displaying _“..to open the path for those in my wake!”_ before he slices downwards, tearing through the enemy hit for **750 Damage** and inflicting **5 Stacks** of **Scorn** while a huge, burning rift is torn into the air from his slash before it quickly dissipates into ash.

- _80s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Deal 2,500,000 Damage_
- _Achievement 2 - Kill 2,500 Entities during The Nine Circles_
- _Achievement 3 - Land Vulcan’s Tear 300 Times_
- _Achievement 4 - Neutralize the Killer 3 Times Using The Open Path_
- _Achievement 5 - Win 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] N/A** - None for now._
cards.name: Virgil

cards.desc:
# **The Lich**

## _"Death is not an end, but a new beginning, a gateway to eternal servitude."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `798`
`Birthdate:` `January 3rd`
`Origin:` `Unknown`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

The Lich appears as an emaciated skeleton draped in a tattered robe, adorned with ancient jewels at its waist and collar. Glowing purple orbs fill his empty eye sockets. The hood of his robe is always down.

An open, floating tome rests beside him to his left; sinister purple energy seeping out of it’s pages.

_"He had no name, no identity beyond the crushing weight of servitude. A mere shadow in the service of Lord Valerius, he toiled tirelessly in the fields, his meagre rations a constant reminder of his lowly station. Valerius, a man of grotesque appetites, found amusement in the serf's misery. He would often force the young man to perform humiliating tasks, subjecting him to cruel whims and degrading spectacles for the amusement of his guests. Years bled into an eternity of suffering, each day a grim echo of the last._

_Then, amidst the grime and despair, he found it – a Tome of forbidden knowledge, its leather cover worn and ancient, its pages brittle with age. Drawn to it by an inexplicable force, he cradled the Tome in his calloused hands. Though illiterate, the Tome spoke to him, its cryptic message resonating deep within his soul. It whispered of power beyond measure, of dominion over life and death, of an existence beyond the shackles of servitude. A thirst for vengeance, long dormant, ignited within him, a burning desire to escape the cruelties of his existence._

_Driven by this newfound ambition, he delved into the Tome's forbidden secrets. Days turned into nights, sleep abandoned for the intoxicating pursuit of forbidden knowledge. He learned to decipher the ancient runes, to unlock the secrets of the arcane. The Tome, however, demanded a terrible price. As he pushed himself deeper, his body withered, his flesh decaying, his mind twisted by the dark magic that surged within him. The young man became a grotesque caricature of himself, his humanity eroded by the insatiable hunger for power that consumed him._

_Finally, the transformation was complete. The serf was no more. In his place stood the Great Lich, a skeletal mockery of life, bound forever to the magic he had unleashed. Consumed by an insatiable hunger for power and a thirst for eternal vengeance, he now roams the realm, a harbinger of death, seeking to corrupt and consume all that stands before him. The memory of his suffering, a constant, gnawing pain, fuels his unending quest for pain and dominance."_

## **Overview**

A great, yet advanced Killer with some amazingly fun gimmicks, being able to summon a great amount of entities as well as control them! The Lich has some amazing potential in-game, as he can snowball into the later game very easily by overwhelming Survivors with his entities.

Although he has some glaring weaknesses, primarily being his Phylactery and low health, he can deal with these by using his summons as meat-shields as well and clever placement of the Phylactery.

`Idle Animation:` Stands steadfast, hand on his staff as he floats up and down subtly, his Tome’s pages fluttering back and forth randomly.

`Moving Animation:` Floats forward, arms slightly down and his Tome following to the side.

`Weapon - Yggdrasil:` A sinister amalgamation of bone, controlling life and death; able to rend the soul of whomever it pleases. It’s crafted from bone, skeletal hands spiralling upwards to the tip, shaping the staff’s shaft. A green jewel sits snug on the base of the staff, held onto by the palm of a larger hand; and a floating, purple stone floats atop the staff inside of a ring of bone, with the palm of a skeletal hand reaching up towards it in the middle of the ring.

`Standard Attack Animation:` _Swings his Staff forward diagonally, conjuring a purple, translucent skeletal hand that swipes forward._

`Requiem Kill Animation:` _The Survivor's ankles are seized by several ghastly, purple skeletal hands, forcing them to their knees. The Lich gazes down with a smug expression, a hand thoughtfully resting on his chin. With a swift swipe of his staff, he conjures more skeletons to restrain the Survivor. Kneeling before them, the Lich places a hand upon the Survivor's chin and thrusts it upwards. The Survivor's soul, a wailing, purple spirit, is forcibly extracted and drawn into the stone atop the Lich's Staff._

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Amazing Utility & Status Application (Healing, Fragility, Cripple, Stagger, Haste, Resistance)
\+Amazing Summoning Capability
\+Amazing Damage Potential
\+Great Perks
\+Amazing Survivability with Phylactery & Herald Passive

±Base Walkspeed
±Base Standard Attack Damage
±Base Attack Cooldown
±Entity AI

\-Extremely Low Health
\-Little Lethality without Entities
\-Phylactery Vulnerability
\-No Gen Pressure

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Summoner`
- `Difficulty: 4/5 - Expert`
