- `Health: 1,200`
- `Walk-Speed: 23`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 95`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 40`
- `Attack Cooldown: 2.7`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

[_**The Lich’s Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/DjMR99wq/351-lich "‌")

### **Perks**

_**Sigil: Eternal Life**_ | Lights up at the beginning of the match.

- Reveals the **Auras** of any **Survivors** within **21/24/27 Studs** of any **Sigils** or **Dormant Inscriptions.**
- When another Perk’s Sigil is undone or blessed, it’s Sigil is transferred to the _Sigil: Eternal Life_ Inscription, including any accumulated Tokens or effects, and disabling _Sigil: Eternal Life_ instead.

_**Sigil: Rise of the Dead**_ | Lights up a **Dormant Inscription** after the first **Banishment.**

- Every **45 Seconds**, spawn a **3 Shamblers** at 3 random locations.
- Every **90 Seconds**, spawn **2 Wights** at one location, separated by a range of **5~8 Studs.**
- **180 Seconds** after this **Sigil** is lit, if the **Sigil** is still active; create a **Graveyard** at a random available location on the map, which will spawn a horde of **4 Shamblers** every **30 Seconds**, and can only be destroyed if all spawned entities are killed or this Sigil is undone/blessed. If the **Graveyard** is destroyed by killing all spawned entities, another will form after **60 Seconds.**

_**Corpse Bloom**_ | Upon **Banishing** a **Survivor**, block **3 Generators** with the most progress for **15 Seconds.** Gains a **Token** for every **Unique Survivor Banished** up to a maximum of **3/4/5 Tokens.**

- Adds **5 Seconds** to the time blocked for every Token.
- After reaching **Max Tokens,** block **All Generators** for **40 Seconds** _(+5 Seconds per Token)_

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Sigil: Army of Dead**_ | Lights up **3 Dormant Inscriptions** at the beginning of the match. All sigils must be cleansed independently, and the primary effect of this perk will not deactivate until all 3 are undone.

- _Primary Effect:_ Every time a Survivor is downed, summon a [**Corpse Knight**](https://trello.com/c/hvZPseLW/367-corpse-knight "‌") from their location. locations. Every time a Survivor is killed, summon a [**Wraith**](https://trello.com/c/JEtlJ2BG/368-deathbound-revenant "‌") from their location.
- _Sigil of Bones;_ Every **30 Seconds**, summon **2** [**Wights**](https://trello.com/c/JDRBBwBA/354-wight "‌") at one location.
- _Sigil of Undying Loyalty;_ Every **75 Seconds**, summon a [**Corpse Knight**](https://trello.com/c/hvZPseLW/367-corpse-knight "‌") at a random location.
- _Sigil of Dread;_ Every **150 Seconds**, summon a [**Amalgam**](https://trello.com/c/j09onniI/374-corpse-amalgamation "‌") from _Sigil of Dread._ At least _one_ **Wraith** will wander within **100 Studs** of it’s Sigil, and will walk back to this radius after finishing a chase.

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

_Buffs;_

- _Resistance -_ Flat percentage damage resistance. Listed as a % when present.
- _Haste -_ Movement Speed increase. Listed as a % when present.
- _Enraged_ - **+5% Haste** and **Immune** to all damage.

_Ailments;_

- _Fragility -_ Targets take X% more damage from all sources except **Status Effects**.
- _Crippled -_ Disables Sprinting and Stamina regeneration.
- _Stagger -_ Stagger is caused when a **Survivor** either falls from a great height or is afflicted by an **Ability**. Upon being afflicted with **Stagger**, **Survivor Movement Speed** is set to **0**. After **25%** of the **Stagger Duration** has elapsed, **Survivors** will regain their speed over a linear period of time, which is fully regained once the **Stagger Duration** has fully elapsed.
- _Broken -_ Targets suffering from Broken cannot be healed or heal themselves by any means, including **Perks**.

### `Primary Passive:` `The Army of Dead`

A **Soul Energy Meter** appears on the side of your screen, displaying _“0/1000,”_ which can be filled up by harvesting **Soul Energy** using **Coalesce** and **Soul Drain.**

On use _(RMB)_, tap the base of your staff onto the ground and call forth your army of dead; opening 5 Options _(Selected by pressing 1, 2, 3, 4, 5)_ and upon choosing, raise your staff into the air and begin to channel dark energy; swirling energy emitting from the purple stone. The amount of energy that is emitted depends on the option selected, as well as the size of it. _(Energy amount 1:1 to amount of summons, growing larger depending on the strength of the entity.)_

You can also press _LMB_ to fast-summon the last summoned entity without having to choose.

_Option 1 “Rot”;_ Summon **3** [**Shamblers**](https://trello.com/c/HVfUmxNy/310-shambler "‌"). Costs **80 Soul Energy.**

_Option 2 “Rattle“;_ Summon a [**Wight**](https://trello.com/c/JDRBBwBA/354-wight "‌"). Costs **80 Soul Energy.**

_Option 3 “Loyalty“;_ Summon a [**Corpse Knight**](https://trello.com/c/hvZPseLW/367-corpse-knight "‌"). Costs **300 Soul Energy.**

_Option 4 “Dread“;_ Summon a [**Amalgam**](https://trello.com/c/j09onniI/374-corpse-amalgamation "‌"). Costs **750 Soul Energy.**

All summoned entities will follow you for **35 Seconds** before beginning to wander.

You can also **command** any _summoned_ entities within **75 Studs** of you to attack the closest player to your cursor for **15 Seconds**, beginning a chase with them. The forced aggro will expire after 15 Seconds, but they will continue to chase them as long as they still meet the chase requirements entities have.

- _5s Cooldown_

### `Secondary Passive:` `Acromegaly`

Every time a Survivor is downed, regardless of if it’s by you or an entity, gain **100 Soul Energy** and summon a **Shambler** at a random spawnpoint.

Every Survivor killed is transformed into a [**Wraith**](https://trello.com/c/JEtlJ2BG/368-wraith "‌") and grants you **500 Soul Energy** on kill.

### `Tertiary Passive:` `Herald of Death`

You have several immunities; _Bleeding, Disabled, Darkness._

All summoned entities are healed for **50%** of all damage dealt by you, and will additionally gain **15% Resistance** while you are chasing a Survivor.

Any damage taken by you has **50%** of it dispersed across all entities within **50 Studs** of you.

### `AB1/Z:` `Soul Drain`

Raise your open hand up as you begin to siphon the souls of all Survivors in front of you _(40 Stud Range)_ for **5 Seconds** as long as they are in range; dealing **2 damage/0.5s** and gaining **5 Soul Energy** every **0.5s** for every Survivor being siphoned. The energy you siphon from them are sucked into the Tome’s open pages.

- _15s Cooldown_

### `AB2/X:` `Death's Grip`

Swipe your arm to the side, lighting up the Tome; summoning a large, ghastly, incorporeal and skeletal hand that raises itself up before slamming down onto the ground in front of it in a **20 Stud Area**, dealing **30 Damage** to all **Survivors** hit and afflicting them with **Crippled** for **3 Seconds** and **20% Fragility** for **5 Seconds** as well as causing them to become **Staggered.**

- _18s Cooldown_

### `AB3/C:` `Coalesce / Disperse`

On use, prompt you to press **LMB** or **RMB** to use _Coalesce_ or _Disperse_. Cooldowns between these are shared.

### _Coalesce;_

Tap the base of your staff onto the ground, sending out a wave of green energy and immediately rend the souls of every Survivor and Entity within a **55 Stud Range** of you, dealing **15 Damage**, afflicting all effected Survivors with **25% Fragility** for **15 Seconds**, healing for **25 Health** for every effected target, gain **30 Soul Energy** for every effected Survivor, gain **10 Soul Energy** for every effected Entity, and grant you **+2% Haste** and **+1 Second** for every target. _(Deals 10x Damage to Entities.)_

The shreds of the target’s souls are sucked into the stone of Yggdrasil. _(Your staff.)_

- _20s Cooldown_

### _Disperse;_

Swing your open hand upwards; lighting the Tome up and sending out a wave of purple energy and immediately fortify the souls of all entities in a **100 Stud Range**; healing them for **30% Max Health**, granting them **50% Resistance** for **40 Seconds**, and granting them **15% Haste** for **10 Seconds.**

- _30s Cooldown_

### `AB4/V:` `Heart of Darkness`

On use, place down your **Phylactery.** The Phylactery appears as a small, black cage made of an unknown dark metal, shaped into bones. Within this cage is a red Gem, suspended by chains linking to the cage.

While your Phylactery is inactive; you are invisible, **Concealed**, and move at **35 Walkspeed** but cannot attack or use abilities.

While the Phylactery is active, however, you regain all of your abilities and can play as normal, as well as gaining the ability to **Heal 65% of all damage taken** dispersed over the next **3 Seconds.**

Your health cannot be reduced below **1HP** while the Phylactery is active, but you will incur a **45% Hinder** at **1HP.** In the event your health does reach **1HP**, you will be afflicted with **Broken** for **10 Seconds.** Afterwards, you will gain **Enraged** for **10 Seconds.**

The Phylactery remains invisible past **20 Studs** for **60 Seconds** and has a **80% Damage Reduction** after placement, but becomes completely visible and vulnerable afterwards.

The Phylactery has **750 Health,** and in the event it is dispatched, you will be reduced to **0 Health** and **Stunned.**

You can re-use this ability at any time to recall the Phylactery, but you will return to your incorporeal state.
It cannot be recalled for **10 Seconds** after taking damage.

- _1s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Harvest 25,000 Soul Energy_
- _Achievement 2 - Cripple 250 Survivors using Death’s Grip_
- _Achievement 3 - Damage 200 Survivors after using Coalesce_
- _Achievement 4 - Down 100 Survivors with Entities after using Disperse_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 100 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] The Chained God** - Skin based on Vecna from the Fifth Edition of Forgotten Realms._

# **The Lamentations**

## _"█ ██ ███ ████████████."_

The Lamentations appears as a tall, towering, pitch black figure devoid of any kind of reflection. Their face cannot be observed, and is permanently shrouded in a glitched effect. They possess three massive pairs of black ‘angel’ wings, two wings sprouting to the side, two above the first pair, and two below the first pair. They have two legs that terminate at the ankles, and therein Lamentations moves by floating off of the ground; albeit the legs still move as if they were walking. They possess only one arm and hand on their right side. Lamentations wields a short, curved sickle with their single arm and hand.

![angel.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/66fcdb6eadb46c1443574837/attachments/66fe1f4aa603a72bc46c3ea7/download/angel.png)

# **The Constellation (α [ALPHA])**

## _"TRANSMITTING - GAMMA. 10-5 BETA, DELTA, EPSILON, ZETA, THETA, OMICRON, SIGMA: 10-1. RECOUP TO ALPHA."_

The Constellation appears as a tall, bulky, pitch black creature with the surface of it’s skin being a reflective and shiny goo. It has no discernible face; only having an opening in the shape of the Lupus Constellation with glowing a bright white with neon indigo shining from the borders of this openings. It also has an opening below this Constellation opening with the same shining light. It also has these openings on it’s torso, three on one side resembling that of three ribs and two on the other side of the torso, as well as one of it’s left thigh. Other notable features about it include; both arms are notably long, with it’s right arm having three long, thick, finger-like appendages at the end of it, and it’s left arm also has three long finger-like appendages but they are very thin. Another feature is a large server-like machine sticking out of it’s back with a transmitter attached to it. The lights on the machine shine a bright blue with a flashing red light on one of the Server’s lights.

`Standard Attack Animation:` Morph your right hand into an axe-like blade and swing downwards.

### **Overview**

- `Difficulty: 6/5 - Grand-Master`
- `Health: 2,500 `
- `Walk-Speed: 21 `
- `Standard Attack Damage: 45`
- `Attack Cooldown: 2.6 `

_"Lore Excerpt"_

The Constellation is a very intricate Killer, having many mechanics to cycle it’s Cooldowns in it’s base form and having **Nine entire forms it can take**, each having it’s own abilities, and each one (_Except Alpha_) having it’s own AI when not being directly controlled. This makes the Constellation by far the most skill-intensive Killer to use, rewarding this with it’s absurd potential if used effectively.

\+Extremely Powerful Kit All-Round
\+Tools for Everything
\+High Damage
\+High Health
\+Cooldown Cycling Potential
\+POTENTIAL MAN!

±Low Base Walk-Speed (Negated by Ability)

\-**Extremely** Intricate and Complicated to Utilize
\-Fast Paced and requires the utmost effort to effectively use
\-AI Reliant
\-Constellations can be killed and remove an entire section of your power for a chunk of time
\-Respawn Times
\-POTENTIAL MAN!

## **Obtainment**

- _Own_ [_**The Goner**_](https://trello.com/c/aWOUxLvc/221-the-goner "‌") _Achievement_

## **Loadout**

### **Perks**

_**Perk1**_ | Description

_**Perk2**_ | Description

_**Perk3**_ | Description

### **Mastery Perk**

_**MasteryPerk**_ | Description

### `Passive:` `The Constellation`

Upon spawning in, every **30 Seconds** one of the **Constellations** will spawn. The order of spawn is the same order in which the switch order is below. If a **Constellation** is killed, they will respawn in their given time. **Tier I Constellations** will respawn after **45 Seconds**, **Tier II Constellations** will respawn after **75 Seconds**, and **Tier III Constellations** will respawn after **95 Seconds**.

**You**, the main body, are ALPHA. On use, switch to the next Constellation. Order goes: ALPHA, [BETA](https://trello.com/c/6KAgTtQv/204-%CE%B2-beta "‌"), [DELTA](https://trello.com/c/iKcX919y/205-%CE%B4-delta "‌"), [ZETA](https://trello.com/c/IYmao6X4/203-%CE%B6-zeta "‌"), [THETA](https://trello.com/c/xMXXHwAB/208-%CE%B8-theta "‌"), [SIGMA](https://trello.com/c/zBeB1lxY/207-%CF%83-sigma "‌"), [GAMMA](https://trello.com/c/eM1HIexQ/202-%CE%B3-gamma "‌"), [EPSILON](https://trello.com/c/xQzhuPtg/201-%CE%B4-epsilon "‌"), [OMICRON](https://trello.com/c/s6MkzMu0/206-%CE%BF-omicron "‌"). Loops back to ALPHA once it reaches the end.

- _30s Cooldown (Per Constellation, switching to ALPHA has No Cooldown.)_

### `AB1/Z:` `DIRECT`

Switch to the selected Constellation.

- _15s Cooldown_

### `AB2/X:` `TARGET EXPOSED`

Hunch over, gaining a **50%** [**Hinder**](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")\*\* as\*\* your screen being taken over by a blue hue as circuits appear on the border. A reticle forms over every **Survivor** in your **Line-of-Sight** and within a **145 Stud Range**. The reticle takes **6 Seconds** to fully lock on; and once it focuses, all **Survivors** who were locked on by `TARGET EXPOSED` are shot with a Nanite that shoots from the servers on your back and sticks to them. **Survivors** hit have their **Aura** revealed for **15 Seconds** and are afflicted with **Exhausted** for **30 Seconds**. Furthermore, they have their **Proficiency** for **Healing** and **Objectives** reduced by **33%** for **120 Seconds**. The Nanite dissolves after **120 Seconds**.
Landing this successfully will reduce all **Cooldowns** by **3 Seconds** for every **Survivor** effected, as well as reducing **Constellation Passive Cooldown** and **respawn times** of dead **Constellations** by **5 Seconds** for every **Survivor** effected.

- _50s Cooldown_

### `AB3/C:` `EXTERMINATE`

Point your thin fingers ahead of you, converging the tips of them together. An orb of red energy begins to form at the tip of your fingers, before shooting out a thin beam of energy that will deal **45 Damage** upon hitting a **Survivor** and inflict [**Burning**](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌") for **5 Seconds**. This beam will pierce through **Survivors**, as well as **two surfaces;** allowing it to be shot **through walls**. Has a range limit of **160 Studs**. Successful hits will reduce all **Cooldowns** by **15 Seconds**, as well as reducing **respawn times** of dead **Constellations** by **25 Seconds**. Successful hits will also **Heal** all **Constellations** for **500 Health** (_Excluding ALPHA_).

- _35s Cooldown_

### `AB4/V:` `TRANSMIT`

Deploy your Transmitter, sending out a Signal to all of your **Constellations**. When this happens, every **Survivor** within a **200 Stud Range** of you that is in motion while not crouching will begin to immediately be pursued by all of the currently spawned **Constellations** on the map for **30 Seconds**, regardless of distance. If a **Constellation** is already chasing a **Survivor**, it will instead continue chasing that **Survivor** instead of switching targets. After the **30 Seconds** is over, they will resume normal behavior. However, if they are already in chase with one of the effected **Survivors**, it will continue pursuing them. Every **Survivor** effected will reduce all **Cooldowns** by **3 Seconds**.

- _40s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Successfully Land “EXTERMINATE” 200 Times_
- _Achievement 2 -_
- _Achievement 3 -_
- _Achievement 4 -_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 100 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Goner** -_

# **The Lost**

## _"I swear, My People, I shall return."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `████`
`Birthdate:` `████`
`Origin:` `Kingdom of ████`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

Lost is a large, towering stone statue of a king, adorned with a crown and a long, billowing stone cape. A linked sword rests at their waist. A large, hollow pit is visible in the center of their chest, where a heart would be, with cracks and fissures crawling outward from it. Beyond these features, Lost has a blank face and no other discernible physical attributes.

_"The King was a fair and just ruler, a benevolent and revered figure within a world of cruelty. He was compassionate, judging his people justly and treating them with an unwavering kindness; whispers of the King’s wisdom and tales of his benevolence and unwavering support of his people turning him into a beacon of hope within a world often shrouded in sorrow and darkness._

_But this era had passed, and the only remnants of the King’s tales now lost to time; forgotten. And the Kingdom that once was now languishes in an inexorable sorrow. His people gone, his Kingdom lost, and himself forgotten; leaving only the Statue of a King now lost, surrounded by an overwhelming and solemn grief; attempting to find and rebuild the Kingdom that is no more."_

## **Overview**

KillerDesc

`Idle Animation:` Stands completely still, hands on it’s hip.

`Moving Animation:` Null.

`Tether Animation:` The Survivor’s screens will darken with each movement Lost makes. The first movement is Lost reaching down, then grabbing the Survivor by the neck, before holding them up.

`Weapon - Lost Credence / The Great King:` The Lost king’s blade, cracked and forsaken. / The hands of a once Great King, commanding great respect.

`Standard Attack Animation:` _On a successful attack, he appears to be reaching out towards the Survivor or in a stationary motion of swinging his sword._

`Requiem Kill Animation:` _The Survivor is quickly forced down onto their knees, kneeling down to the massive statue ahead of them. The Statue seems to move closer in an instant, no movement having been observed; and suddenly, as the camera pans around, the Survivor is now a Statue of themselves; now holding a pitchfork._

### `Primary Passive [LMB Active]:` `The Lost King`

_Cosmetic:_ Once Lost spawns in on the map, it darkens the map and the screen of all Survivors' screens slightly. Lost also has a kind of lullaby, with the closer Lost is in proximity to Survivors; the more their screens darken and sharpen. While in chase, Survivors have their screen slightly more saturated/sharpened and see quotes appear on their screen in Times New Roman font every few seconds;

- _“Guide my way, please.“_
- _“Just a little further..“_
- _“My people.. I’m so close.“_
- _“I have to hurry…“_
- _“I swear to my Kingdom, I shall return!“_
- _“How much further..“_
- _“I’m lost..“_
- _“Just..“_
- _“Wait for me, my Queen..“_
- _“Don’t run, you must aid me!“_

_Passive Effects:_

- Unable to equip _“Summoner”_ Perks.
- Survivors within **7 Studs** of Lost will incur a **5% Hinder**, and any in direct contact will take **10 Damage/s** and incur a **+15% Hinder** as long as they stay in direct contact.

_Active Ability:_ Lost is a stationary Statue, his only form of locomotion being the ability to teleport. While unobserved, Lost will move at **30 Walkspeed** without the need to move via teleportation. Loud, heavy footfalls can be heard by Survivors nearby Lost when they are moving.

When being observed, holding **RMB** will show a marker at the cursor with a **25 Stud Range.** Releasing the button will cause you to appear at that location. If a Survivor is within the attack radius when Lost teleports, they will be hit by Lost’s **Standard Attack**, with Lost’s model changing to them either reaching out towards the Survivor they hit or in a swinging motion with their linked sword. A loud bell accompanied by a heavy footstep will play when Lost teleports, and a deep, droning sound will play on-hit, quickly fading out.

When tethered, Lost’s teleport cooldown will be reduced to **1 Second**, but Lost can no longer use Standard Attacks.

Teleporting will make all observing Survivor’s screens darken to a saturated black before fading quickly back in. _(Closest example to this ability is SCP-173 from SCP: SL)_

- _1.5s Cooldown_

### `Secondary Passive:` `The Lost Kingdom`

At the beginning of the game, **30 Statues** will spawn across the map; each with a **70% Chance** to be a **Peasant** and a **30% Chance** to be a **Knight**, with the Knights having a max of **10 Spawned** and a minimum of **5 Spawned.**

These Statues are primarily harmless to Survivors, being immobile. Although, if a Survivor is in direct contact with one, they will take **10 damage/s** while touching it and incur a **5% Hinder** while in contact as well as incurring a **5%** **Fading Hinder** for **5 Seconds** afterwards, decaying at 1% per second.

These Statues can be interacted with by Lost by using the _Interact_ key, in which the screen will blink with each movement; _Lost reaches down, placing a hand onto the Statue’s head and uttering the words “Follow.”_

Afterwards, the Statue will become mobile and turn into whichever entity it was a statue of and this passive will go on cooldown.

# **Imase Yoru**

## _"The shadows embrace me."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `19`
`Birthdate:` `September 27th`
`Origin:` `Japan`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

Imase is a petite Japanese man with dark black hair with blue highlights in his bangs and bright orange cat-eye contacts. He has fair skin with several freckles on his right cheekbone, alongside several silver lip piercings and an upside down cross earring on his right ear composed of black titanium.
Imase dons a black hoodie with a large fur hood _(Le Grande Bleu Fur Hood Hoodie Ref.)_ with additional zippers and red tints as vertical lining on the left and right side of the hoodie.
As for his pants, he wears ripped black jeans with various chains hooked from each side and a belt wrapped around each thigh, alongside a pocket on the lower part of the left leg of his jeans. Attached to his jeans is a black leather holster for his dagger. Lastly, he wears platform boots with several belts around it and zippers on the sides.
Imase always holds his dagger in his right hand except while wielding a gun, in which he will place it in the holster attached to his jeans. A flourish animation will play when he pulls it back out.

_"Lore Excerpt"_

## **Overview**

Imase is a simple character to learn but has a lot of potential in his kit, being able to have amazing stealth potential throughout a match through his passive and his ability. His ability further has great damage and ambush potential, dishing out meaningful in quick bursts and afflicting enemies with a stacking Bleed effect. Alternatively, he can be used to power through Objectives with his passive the more interactions and proximity to the Killer he has, and can punish larger Terror Radi to gain more stacks of Yurei.

`Idle Animation:` After 5 seconds idle, Imase begins to inspect his dagger.

`Walking Animation:` Default with dagger in hand.

`Sprinting Animation:` Default with dagger in hand.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Great On-Demand Stealth & Haste
\+Objective Potential
\+Damage Potential

±Neutral

\-Low Health
\-Low Stamina Regen
\-Passive Value Requires Killer Interactions
\-Long Cooldowns
\-Demanding Passive

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Stealth`
- `Sub-Archetype: Preservation`
- `Difficulty: 2.5/5 - Intermediate`
- `Health: 90`
- `Stamina: 8`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.65`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

### _Mentioned_ [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌"):

Status Effects that appear within this Character’s Kit.

- _**Concealed**_ - Conceals all actions and blocks all Aura-reading. Also applies the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.
- _**Silenced**_ - Silences footsteps, Loud Noise Notifications, and all ambient noises _(Ambient Killer Noises, Survivor Breathing, & Grunts of Pain)._
- _**Distortion**_ - Conceals all actions, blocks all Aura-reading, silences footsteps, Loud Noise Notifications, and all ambient noises _(Ambient Killer Noises, Survivor Breathing, & Grunts of Pain)_ as well as applying the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.
- _**Power**_ - % Damage increase.
- _**Haste**_ - % Movement Speed increase.
- _**Bleed**_ - Targets suffering from **Bleed** will take **1 Damage** per tick. Does not damage at or below **10 HP.** For each tier above 1, will halve the amount of time between each tick, starting from **1 second.**

### **Perks**

_**Glyph: Eyes in the Dark [3 Points]**_ | _“There are things that watch just beyond the precipice of the fog you just can’t seem to see past, behind the threshold into the pitch black darkness, right around that walk you just can’t seem to bring yourself to walk around.“_
Interact with a **Dormant Inscription** or **Sigil** to **bless** it and create a **Glyph.**
_Glyph: Eyes in the Dark_ has a **60 Stud Radius.**
All **Survivors** benefit from the following effects while inside the **Glyph’s Radius**:

- _A chime will play anytime the Killer is effected by the Concealed, Silenced, or Distortion Status._
- _Reveal the Killer’s Aura for 2/4/6 Seconds after the Status Ends_
  - Effects will persist for **5 Seconds** after leaving the Glyph’s radius.

_**Precipice [2 Points]**_ | _“On the precipice of defeat you will find your inner strength.“_
Every **1%** of **HP Lost** will grant a stacking +**1% Power**.
Stacks decay at a rate of **3%/2%/1%** each second after not taking damage for **5 Seconds.**

_**Bad Omens [2 Points]**_ | _“You have the uncanny ability to sense bad omens coming your way and exploit them to your advantage.“_

Power awakens in your Aura-reading ability.

- When crouching, the **Auras** of all **Entities** within **30/45/60 Studs** are revealed to you.
- When crouching, the **Aura** of the **Killer** will be revealed to you within **30 Studs** for **3 Seconds** with a **15 Second Cooldown**.

Upon killing **entities** and **stunning** the **Killer**, gain a Stack up to a maximum of **10 Stacks.**

- For each stack, gain +**1%/2%/3% Healing Speed.**
  - When killing a **Tier I & II Entity**, gain **1 Token.**
  - When killing a **Tier III Entity**, gain **2 Tokens.**
  - When killing a **Tier IV Entity** or **stunning** the **Killer**, gain **3 Tokens.**
- Lose **2 Tokens** every time you perform a **Healing Action.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Dangai**_ | _“I live on the precipice of death.“_

The lower your health is, the quicker you perform **Healing & Repair Actions**, gaining **+1% Proficiency** in both for every **2% Health Lost.**

While **Injured,** suppress all ambient Survivor noises _(Breathing, Grunts of Pain)_.
When entering the **Injured State**, gain **Distortion** for **20 Seconds** and go on cooldown for **75 Seconds.** _(Only applies when entering the Injured State from the Healthy State.)_

### `Passive:` `Yūrei`

Every **15 Seconds** within the **Killer’s Terror Radius** grants a stack of _Yūrei_.
Upon pressing the **Passive Ability** key, consume all stacks to gain **2 Seconds** of **Distortion** and **+0.5% Haste** for each stack accumulated.
Alternatively, when next to a generator, press the **Passive Ability** key to begin **Repairs**, in which **Good Skill Checks** are replaced with **Great Skill Checks** and consume 1 stack. _(Natural Great Skill Checks will not consume a stack.)_

- _75s Active Cooldown_

### `AB1/Q:` `Umibōzu`

_Passive:_ Imase wields the _Rasen no Vēru no Tanken_ _(“Helix Dagger of the Veil“)_, which is a helical dagger that replaces the default **Knife** weapon. It’s a small dagger with a dual helical blade, made of a mysterious black metal. It radiates a dark energy, black fog emanating from the metal of it’s body. The hilt and handle of it has blue glowing engravings, while the blade itself has writing in runes all the way up it’s body.
It deals a base damage of **75 Damage** and inflicts **Bleed II** for **10 Seconds** on hits from behind. Additional backstabs will add **10 Seconds** to the Bleed timer.
Attacking with it has Imase thrust the blade forward quickly. It has a distinct “whoosh” sound as it’s thrusted forward.

On use, Imase veils himself in shadows; becoming entirely invisible past **35 Studs** and intermittently visible within that radius for **20 Seconds**. During this, he gains **Distortion** and deals **+50% Damage** when attacking enemies from behind. **Melee Attacks** deal **+100% Damage** during the duration of this ability, and **+150% Damage** from behind.
Successful Melee Attacks from behind on the **Killer** grants **+5 Seconds** of duration to this ability and **+5% Additional Damage** on top of the damage boost.

Successful Melee Attacks from behind outside of the ability’s duration reduce the **Cooldown** by **20 Seconds.**

- _120s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Be Effected by the Distortion Status for a total of 1,000 Seconds_
- _Achievement 2 - Perform 100 Backstabs during Umibōzu_
- _Achievement 3 - Escape 25 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] X** -_
cards.name: Imase Yoru

cards.desc:
# **Ato - The Ardor**

## _"Hatred of my inadequacy was my excuse. I grew to resonate deeply with my nature. I ravished in bloodshed and bliss. I divided meaning for my existence in my plate and the offal on it. Ato was every bit the villain you knew them to be."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `27 / N/A`
`Birthdate:` `March 5th / N/A`
`Origin:` `???`
`Gender:` `Non-Binary`

Ardor has a slim, petite form, appearing quite feminine with long, fluffy, flowing black hair. They have pronounced tufts of fluffy hair on the sides of their face, which is covered by an odd rabbit mask with deep, hollow crimson eyes glaring from behind it, with an angry and vengeful visage.

The ends of Ardor’s limbs are completely blackened, crawling and spreading upwards towards the upper parts of their limbs, a gradient back to their normal skin tone the higher up on their limbs.

As for Ardor’s clothes, they wear a deep crimson, dried blood-stained turtle-neck jacket with no discernible features, alongside torn black jeans.

A collection of various blackened weapons are embedded in their right shoulder, dripping with a mysterious fluid. The section of their back the knives are embedded in is covered with a black mass, veins crawling out from it and covering that section of their back and shoulder, slightly extending to their neck as well.

A long red rod earring hangs from their left ear.
The hand they wield their blade with has a shackle around it’s wrist, with a chain connected to the blade’s tang.
Their left hand has deep grooves through it, as if made of a rock, trailing up the top of their fingers to an odd, sinister symbol resting on the top center of the hand. It will occasionally light up, glowing a deep blood-red.

- _Mask & Jacket Reference_
  - ![Ayato\_Black\_Rabbit.webp](https://trello.com/1/cards/689834cdee2af75144f14288/attachments/68edac54bd84a385d4acae78/download/Ayato_Black_Rabbit.webp)

## _"Lore:_ [_The Butcher’s 'Zelkova'_](https://trello.com/c/ARKPS3NB/476-the-butcher-zelkova "‌")"

## **Overview**

A flesh-hungry and vindicated character, now become an aspect of pure vehemence and rage, the Butcher is a very aggressive chase-style killer with consistent bleed-type status application and self-healing.

`Idle Animation:` Stands with head tilted, breathing in and out heavily, body moving up and down accordingly. Occasionally, the arm holding their blade will twitch.
`Moving Animation:` Runs forward with a relatively regular running cycle, swinging their arms back and forth ahead of them as they run.
`Spawn Animation:` Butcher appears stepping in from a tear in space that, an unrecognizable and incomprehensible dimensions of horrors, blood-red fog spilling out of it. Several red, foggy, humanoid shadows trail off of Butcher’s back as they step forward, deep blood-red puddles forming under their feet with every heavy stomp they take forward. They turn around to the rift and point their blade towards it with an unbridled rage, before swinging it downwards and looking back forward.
`Tether Animation:` They thrust their hand onto the back of the Survivor’s neck aggressively, gripping them with immense force as they lift them up and holding them in front of them.

`Weapon - Repressed Vehemence:` A long, cracked and broken blade with no handle. It emits a deep, black smoke, and has a pristine edge running across it’s curved body, emitting a deep, blood-red ethereal glow. Butcher holds it by it’s tang.
`Standard Attack Animation:` _Butcher swings downwards, chopping the Survivor hit. Cleans off the blood by wiping down the blade with their left hand, absorbing it. The grooves glow when absorbing the blood._
`Requiem Kill Animation:` _The Butcher seizes the Survivor by the top of their head, hoisting them upward. With their blade raised high, they hack into the Survivor’s right shoulder, each strike driving deeper until the arm is severed completely, spraying blood across the scene around them. Without pause, they turn to the left arm, cleaving it off in two chops. The Requiem ends as the Butcher drives their blade into the Survivor’s neck, hacking bit by bit until the third strike finally severs the head. The Butcher kicks the Survivors lifeless body down, holding their head up before tossing it to the side, the camera following it as it rolls away, showing the Butcher standing and watching from behind._

### **Pros and Cons**

\+Relatively Low Skill Floor
\+Good Status Application
\+Great Damage Potential
\+Self-Healing

±High Skill Ceiling
±Aim Reliant Abilities*

\-Low Base M1 Damage
\-Might Take Some Getting Used To
\-Needs CD Management

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Chase`
- `Difficulty: 2.5/5 - Intermediate~Advanced`
- `Health: 2,150`
- `Walk-Speed: 23`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 115`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 17 + Bleed I for 8 Seconds`
- `Attack Cooldown: 1.5`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

[_**The Butcher’s Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/GpDGzOZ9/295-butcher "‌")

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _**Broken**_ - Targets suffering from Broken cannot be healed or heal themselves by any means, including **Perks**.
- _**Bleed**_ - Targets suffering from **Bleed** will take **1 Damage** per tick. Does not damage at or below **10 HP.** For each tier above 1, will halve the amount of time between each tick, starting from **1 second.**
- _**Helpless**_ - Disables all ability use.
- _**Deep Wounds**_ - Increases the Charges required to heal by **25%**, and also decreasing healing speeds by **25%** for one Heal. (Applies to healing self or being healed by others)
- _**Haemorrhage**_ - Survivors suffering from **Haemorrhage** will bleed profusely, leaving much more blood behind them. Healing progress will regress at **300%** the normal rate.
- _**Hinder/Hindered**_ - % Movement Speed reduction.
- _**Fatal Wounds**_ - Starts a **15 Second** timer that will regress while not running. Once the **15 Second** timer is up, the **Survivor** afflicted will be downed. **Fatal Wounds** can be cleansed by performing a **Mend Action** on yourself or have another **Survivor** mend you. This counts as a **Health State**, and will **not** heal your actual health; you must still heal your actual **Health** as a separate action.

### **Perks**

_**Serrated Blade [2 Points]**_ | _“The savagery of unhinged violence, sawed serrations on the blades leaving deep cuts.”_
When hitting a **Survivor** with your **Standard Attack**, inflict **Broken** for **40/55/70 Seconds** then go on a **60s Cooldown**.

_**Severe Pressure [3 Points]**_ | _“The air around that beast is heavy, leaving those unfortunate enough to come face-to-face with it stricken with fear.”_
**Survivors** repairing **Generators** or **Healing** within your **Terror Radius** will suffer from the following effects;

- _**Increased** the odds of a **Skill-Check** appearing by **8/10/12%**._
- _**Decreases** the **Success Zone** of **Skill-Checks** by **40/50/60%**._

_**Intimidation [2 Points]**_ | _“A looming dread fills the hunting grounds.”_
While outside of **Chase**, your **Terror Radius** is reduced by **30/35/40 Studs**. While in **Chase**, your **Terror Radius** is **increased** by **30/45/60 Studs**.

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Savage Obsession**_ | _“It’s infatuated with the hunt, insisting on the extended pursuance of it’s prey over simply finishing it’s tasks.”_
Become **Fixated** with a random **Survivor**. Whenever you hit a **Survivor** who is not the **Fixation** with a **Standard Attack**, gain a Token, up to a Maximum of 10.

- Grants a stack-able **4% Cooldown Reduction** on **Successful Standard Attacks** per token, up to a maximum of **40%**.
- Whenever you hit your Fixation with a **Standard** or **Special Attack**, lose 2 Tokens.
  - Whenever the **Fixation** is either **Forsaken** or **Killed**, Savage Obsession freezes at it's current Token count and cannot be increased or decreased.

---

### `[Passive]:` `Fervor`

A ‘_Fervor’_ meter is available to Butcher.

This meter can be filled through injuring Survivors and collecting _Blood._ Survivors below **60% HP** will drop **3 Blood Orbs** every 5 Seconds and drop **+100% Blood Orbs** when performing an action _(Repairing, Healing, Vaulting, Wedging, etc.)_
These _Blood Orbs_ are highlighted to Butcher at a range of **40 Studs.**
Survivors can see _Blood Orbs_ for **3 Seconds** after releasing them, after which they will become invisible to Survivors.

Butcher can absorb these orbs by holding the _Passive Ability_ key, in which Butcher will point their blade forward, reducing walkspeed to **17** while absorbing the orbs into the blade, filling the meter.

_Fervor_ Charges are filled at the rates below;

- _+20c On Successful Standard Attack_
- _+2c per Orb_
- _+1c/s_

Once full, _Fervor_ can be activated by pressing the _Passive Ability_ key, which will enact an animation in which; _The Butcher stabs their blade through their mask's eye-hole, driving it through their head as black blood spills out. They then rip it out, and the blade merges into their arm amidst a spill of blood-red mist, forming a large, rough bladed-arm with glowing, blood-red grooves._

After finishing this animation, all Survivors within **150 Studs** are revealed with **Killer Instinct** for **5 Seconds.**

_Merged Blade Ref:_

![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/689834cdee2af75144f14288/attachments/68a24bd8b555f28ddc7c15bb/download/image.png)

During _Fervor_, Butcher gains the following effects;

- _+8% Haste_
- _30 Damage Standard Attack_
- _Inflict Bleed II for 5 Seconds on-hit with Standard Attacks_
- _+50% Action Speeds_
- _-50% Stun Duration_

_Fervor_ lasts for 35 Seconds, meter resetting back to **0%** after ending.

---

### `[AB1/Z]:` `Dress`

_**(25s)**_ Butcher rushes forward, dragging their blade along the ground before swinging it upwards; gashing any Survivor(s) hit, dealing **20 Damage** and inflicting **Helpless** for 5 Seconds and **Bleed I** for 10 Seconds. Has a **2.7 Second** recovery on-hit, and a **1.5 Second** recovery if missed.

### `[AB1/Z ALT]:` `Eucharist`

_**(25s)**_ Replaces _Dress_ during _Fervor._

The Butcher rushes forward with a swift upward thrust of their bladed arm, skewering any Survivor for **20 damage.** They hold the Survivor aloft as their blade glows, absorbing their blood and healing the Butcher for **15% Missing HP** over 2 seconds. Finally, they swing the Survivor off their arm, ripping out a chunk of their insides and inflicting **Deep Wounds** and **Haemorrhage** for 60 Seconds.

If this ability is used a second time within 15 seconds of a successful hit, the Butcher lowers their bladed arm and lifts their mask to feast on the leftover flesh. This heals them for **10% Max Health** and reveals the hit Survivor for 3 seconds, while also inflicting **20%** **Hinder** and **Helpless** for 5 seconds.

---

### `[AB2/X]:` `Inhibition`

_**(30s)**_ The Butcher holds and swings their bladed chain, which can be held for up to 3 seconds. Releasing the ability fires the blade at the cursor's location, with a range of 100 Studs. If missed, the blade will simply bounce off the surface and Butcher will incur a **1.5-second recovery animation.**

On hit, the blade embeds into the Survivor. The Butcher then holds the M2 key to reel them in, causing the chain to glow red and spikes to attach to the Survivor. During the reel, the Butcher's movement is limited to **10 Walkspeed**, and they cannot perform other actions. The Survivor can struggle to break the chain by holding the Interact key.

Once the Survivor is at close range, the Butcher can perform a Special Attack by pressing the M1 key. This rips the blade out, dealing **30 Damage** and inflicting **Fatal Wounds**, after which the Butcher enters a **2.5-second recovery animation.**

If the chain breaks, the Survivor will be afflicted with **Fatal Wounds** and take **10 Damage** as the Butcher enters a **3.75-second recovery**. the embedded blade dissipating and reappearing in their hands.

- Moving towards the Survivor while reeling speeds up the chain's breaking by **25%.**
- Moving away slows it by **20%.**
- The chain's breaking speed increases by **75%** if a surface or wall blocks the connection.

### `[AB2/X ALT]:` `Exhibition`

_**(22s)**_ Replaces _Inhibition_ during _Fervor_.

The Butcher hunches over before releasing a harrowing roar, revealing the auras of all moving Survivors. This inflicts **15% Hinder** on all revealed Survivors and increases the **Stamina** usage of all Survivors within 160 Studs by **50%.** Butcher gains **+2.5% Haste** for every Survivor revealed, lasting for 6 seconds.

---

### `[AB3/Z]:` `Deify`

_**(35s)**_ The Butcher points their blade to the side as a bright glint shines from their eye behind the mask. This reveals the auras of all Survivors within 250 Studs who are under 50% health or afflicted with one of the following status effects for 15 seconds: _Bleed, Haemorrhage, Deep Wounds,_ or _Fatal Wounds._

---

### `[AB4/V]:` `Aspect of Wrath`

_**(50s)**_ The Butcher's upper body falls limp, but they catch themselves by stabbing their blade into the ground. A crimson glint shines from behind their mask as they begin rushing forward, gaining momentum and leaving a glowing molten trail.

The Butcher starts at **21 Walkspeed**, gaining +1% **Haste** for every second. They cannot stop moving forward; their direction is determined by where they look, not directional keys. The rush lasts for 10 seconds, during which the Butcher is immune to all stuns and damage.

Upon pressing **Standard Attack**, the Butcher lunges forward, pinning any Survivor to the ground. They skewer the Survivor's shoulder for 10 damage, then bite into their neck for 5 damage. After chewing for 3 ticks (15 damage), they rip out a chunk for 20 additional damage before leaping back. This ability immediately ends upon use.

- **Final Effect:** Heals for **20% Missing Health** and inflicts **Fatal Wounds**.

**During Fervor:**

- The Butcher starts at **25 Walkspeed** and deals 15 damage upon pinning a Survivor.
- They heal for **15% Max Health.**
- The animation is relatively the same, besides their arm stabbing into the ground instead.

---

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Activate Fervor 500 Times_
- _Achievement 2 - Inflict any Bleed-Type Status Effect 5,000 Times (Bleed, Haemorrhage, Deep Wounds, Fatal Wounds)_
- _Achievement 3 - Land Inhibition 1,000 Times_
- _Achievement 4 - Land Aspect of Rage 600 Times_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 100 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Vehemence** - Mask is instead replaced with a much more solid mask, much more attached to their head and split into two sides. They also now wear a black hood over their head, a red scarf around their neck and a much baggier, black & brown cloak that covers most of their body. A thick, red, flame-like mist flows out from behind their mask. Everything else about their appearance and accessories remains primarily the same._
  _Mask Ref:_
  ![image.png](https://trello.com/1/cards/689834cdee2af75144f14288/attachments/68a255298cb556069f9871ee/download/image.png)

---

- _**[Mythic] Hanger** - Skin inspired by the Hanger from Decaying Winter._
- _**[Mythic] For Nothing** - Skin inspired by the song ‘Murders’ by Miracle Musical. Makes Butcher entirely monochrome, their body being a deep, neon black with ripple all across their body and a sketchy whirlpool of lines on their stomach. A sketchy black rose is placed on their heart. Their mask is also replaced by a sketchy, white-outlined mask with a sketched eye in the middle and a tear dripping from it. Butcher’s weapon is also replaced by a white, sketchy kitchen knife._
cards.name: The Ardor

cards.desc:
# **Chloe Garrett**

## _"I’ll be damned if I let this define who I am. C'est à moi de décider."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `24`
`Birthdate:` `August 12th`
`Origin:` `French-American`
`Gender:` `Cis Female`

Chloe is a black woman with a small, fluffy curled Afro that is brushed to the right side and a set of three long gold rod earrings in her left ear. Her hair is a deep black with sweet, milky amber highlights.
Her eyes are a deep amber colour, and she has a collection of three star tattoos under her left eye, shrinking in size from left to right. Her bottom lip has a scar down to her chin on the right side.
She wears a black off-the-shoulder top that reveals her left shoulder, held on by a strap over the bridge from her neck to shoulder. The shirt displays in curved words “AU REVOIR, HIER”in white. As for her pants, she wears ripped black jeans with a gilded trim seam down the left side, and for her shoes she wears black platform boots.

_"Lore Excerpt"_

## **Overview**

Chloe is a bold and demanding Survivor, having great abilities for being in direct confrontations with the Killer and being able to shield her teammates by taking half the damage they take. She has great damage potential as well, being able to dish out all the deferred damage she clears alongside dealing damage she takes back to the Killer as well. Although, this leads to her difficulty to use; requiring a moderate amount of skill to effectively use her kit to it’s fullest potential without actively getting yourself killed.

`Idle Animation:` Standing bold, hands at her hips.

`Walking Animation:` Default.

`Sprinting Animation:` Default.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Can Completely Nullify Damage Taken
\+Massive Resistances
\+Damage Potential
\+Peel Potential For Altruistic Play

±Neutral

\-Risky Kit, Encourages Risky Play
\-Can Die To Deferred Damage If Not Cleared
\-Killer Can Counter Bracer by Ignoring You

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Confrontational`
- `Sub-Archetype: Altruistic`
- `Difficulty: 2/5 - Intermediate`
- `Health: 115`
- `Stamina: 7`
- `Stamina Regen: 1`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

### _Mentioned_ [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌"):

Status Effects that appear within this Character’s Kit.

- _Resistance_ - Flat percentage damage resistance. Listed as a % when present.
- _Distortion_ - Conceals all actions, blocks all Aura-reading, silences footsteps, Loud Noise Notifications, and all ambient noises _(Ambient Killer Noises, Survivor Breathing, & Grunts of Pain)_ as well as applying the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.
- _Exhausted_ - Disables the use of Exhaustion Perks. While Exhausted, Survivors will pant heavily.
- _Haste_ - Movement Speed increase. Listed as a % when present.
- _Deep Wounds_ - Increases the Charges required to heal by **25%**, and also decreasing healing speeds by **25%** for one Heal. (Applies to healing self or being healed by others)
- _Fatal Wounds_ - Starts a **15 Second** timer that will regress while not running. Once the **15 Second** timer is up, the **Survivor** afflicted will be downed. **Fatal Wounds** can be cleansed by performing a **Mend Action** on yourself or have another **Survivor** mend you. This counts as a **Health State**, and will **not** heal your actual health; you must still heal your actual **Health** as a separate action.

### **Perks**

_**Made For This [3 Points]**_ | _“You were raised as a survivor, made for it, born to be tough.“_
Permanently gain **25% Resistance.**
Every **25 Damage Taken** grants a stack of _Made For This_. Each stack grants the following effects:

- _1.5%/2%/2.5% Action Proficiency_
- _-2.5% Ailment Duration_
- _+2.5% Resistance_

Every time a **Healing Action** is performed on you, lose **half** of all stacks of _Made For This._

_**Prêt-à-porter [3 Points]**_ | _“You’ve been prepared for this since your conception, and are ready to don the Rift’s thick fog as your own.“_
Pressing the **Active Perk Key** will trigger _Prêt-à-porter:_

- A flock of crow feathers cover you, granting you **Distortion** for **5 Seconds** and turns you **Invisible** past **40 Studs**.

_Prêt-à-porter_ causes the **Exhausted** Status for **60/50/40 Seconds**.
_Prêt-à-porter_ cannot be used while **Exhausted**.
A quiet audio cue of a crow’s caw will play upon being used.

_**Atelier [4 Points]**_ | _“Accustomed to stressful and harsh environments, the rift now serves as your new workshop.“_
Upon being put into the **Injured State**, gain **25 Overhealth**. The Overhealth will begin to decay after **10 Seconds**.
Additionally, while in the **Injured State** and suffering from **Deep Wounds** or **Fatal Wounds** the following effects will apply to you;

- _**+50% Resistance**_
- _**+2% Haste**_

After recovering from **Deep Wounds** or **Fatal Wounds**, gain **+10%/12.5%/15% Action Proficiency** for **15/20/25 Seconds.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Raison d'être**_ | _“Your reason to be.“_
Powers awaken in your Aura-reading ability.

- The three **Furthest** _(Active)_ **Objectives** have their **Auras** revealed to you.
- Increases your **Repair Proficiency** on those Objectives by **10%**
- Upon the completion of a revealed Objective, the furthest Objective from that Objective is revealed.

Additionally, you gain the ability to **Collect** from revealed Objectives after repairing for at least **8 Seconds** by pressing the **Perk Ability Key**, which has the following effects;

- Repairs will instead charge _Raison_ instead of progressing the Objective.
- Every **1 Charge** contributed to Repairs will grant **2 Tokens** for _Atelier_, up to **50 Tokens.**
- **Failed Skill Checks** will remove **25%** of current Tokens.

While performing Repairs and having at least **10 Tokens**, press the **Perk Ability Key** to deposit all _Atelier Tokens_ into the Objective, adding **1% Repair Progress** for every token accumulated.

_Raison_ will lose **all tokens** upon being put into the **Injured State** and disable the perk until healed above **40% HP.**

### `Passive:` `Sang D'acier`

**50%** of all damage taken is **Deferred Over Time**, spreading it over a period of **5 Seconds.** Using the **Passive Ability Key** will clear **50%** of the deferred damage.

All **Deferred Damage Cleared** will be inflicted at once as a separate damage instance the next time Chloe deals damage by any means. This has no upper limit.

- _90s Cooldown_

### `AB1/Q:` `Bracer`

Chloe braces herself, a translucent yellow aura forming over her body as she begins to take **75%** of all damage dealt to nearby Survivors for **6 Seconds**, gaining **80% Resistance** and adding the amount of damage reduced to this ability’s charge.

Upon using this ability again, Chloe then swings her arms to the side and deals the damage number displayed on the ability icon to all enemies within **50 Studs.**

- _60s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Absorb 75,000 Damage with Bracer_
- _Achievement 2 - Deal 50,000 Damage with Bracer_
- _Achievement 3 - Escape 25 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] X** -_
cards.name: Chloe Garrett

cards.desc:
# **Eleanore O’Dwyer - The Banshee**

## _"PLEASE! COME BACK TO ME!"_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `38`
`Birthdate:` `April 2nd, 1893`
`Origin:` `Irish`
`Gender:` `Cis Female`

The Banshee has pale white skin, marked by scratches and scars that run up her arms and legs. As you look down her limbs, they become increasingly translucent, with her hands and feet being the most see-through.
She has long, unkempt black hair, streaming down her back with two parts going down her shoulders over her chest.
Her expression is one of eternal sorrow, characterized by a permanent frown and tear streaks that flow from her sunken eyes. Dark shadows extend outward from the depths of her eye sockets, concealing everything within.
She wears a tattered, grey cloak draped over her body, its hood long since torn away.
Soft sobbing can be heard in a close area around her.

_"Sorrow. Helplessness. A scream for help. Blind. A scream for someone. Woe. A scream for anyone. Hurting. Screams echo into the void. Anguish. Rage. Scream after scream, until her voice becomes the wind itself._

_They say The Banshee roams the desolate graveyard at night, her wails piercing the silence like the cries of the lost. In her sorrow, she beckons to the living, pleading for anyone to help cleanse the unbearable weight of grief she has carried into eternity. Her beloved, the one she cherished above all, departed long ago into the afterlife. Except... he never reached it. She waited for him beyond the veil, but he never came._

_Anger and betrayal burned through her soul, festering into an unholy rage. How could he leave her to wander this desolate place alone? She expected him to walk with her in death, just as they had in life. But his absence tore at her heart, and the agony of his betrayal consumed her. Though deep down, she knows she does not truly blame him, something darker and more twisted has taken hold, transforming her into what she is now—a creature of sorrow, fury, and despair._

_Now, she is doomed to wander what has become her eternal tomb, a restless spirit bound to the earth, haunting those foolish enough to trespass upon her forsaken ground. Her sorrow has twisted into wrath, lashing out at anyone who ventures too close. They hear her wails long before they see her, but by then it is too late. Her touch is cold, and her eyes—once filled with love—now burn with a desperate fury._

_Some say she can be seen at the foot of a solitary grave, the name "A. O'Dwyer" etched into the crumbling stone. There she sits, weeping for hours on end, clutching the earth where her heart once lay. Her cries are not of a lost lover, but of a soul abandoned and forgotten. It is said that she still waits for him, eternally caught between longing and rage, unable to let go of the life she was promised but never received._

_Visitors speak of strange occurrences: whispers on the wind, cold hands brushing their skin, and the feeling of being watched by unseen eyes. The Banshee’s cries, they say, are not just sounds—they are a summons, pulling them closer to their own despair. For those who enter her domain, there is no escape. She weeps not only for herself but for all who cross her path, dragging them into the endless night of her sorrow._

_And when the wailing stops... it is said you will never hear anything thereafter."_

## **Overview**

KillerDesc

`Idle Animation:` Hovers above the ground, feet dangling down.
`Moving Animation:` Floats forward.
`Spawn Animation:` Appear from a cloud of fog, her cloak twisting in a spiral before revealing her body, head in her hands and sobbing.
`Tether Animation:` A foggy hand reaches out from the surface of her cloak, lifting the Survivor into the air by the neck.

`Weapon - Eleanor's Sorrow:` The Banshee utilizes her sorrow as a method to harm those around her, her ghastly wailing effecting their very soul.
`Standard Attack Animation:` _Scream ahead of you, damaging Survivors. Afterwards, cup your face in your hands and let out a sob._
`Requiem Kill Animation:` _Starts with the Survivor being swarmed by visions of The Banshee, appearing all around them and screaming. Suddenly, the Survivor is rushed by The Banshee from the front; grabbing them by the shoulders as they stare down at the Survivor. They then begin to screech at them, shaking the Survivor back and forth as they do, the Survivor’s knee buckling as they slowly drop to their knees, soul leaving their body as the Requiem end. They are left drained of life and soul, sitting on their knees._

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Pro

±Neutral

\-Con

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Technical`
- `Sub-Archetype: Stealth`
- `Difficulty: 2.5/5 - Intermediate/Advanced`
- `Health: 1,600`
- `Walk-Speed: 23.5`
- `Terror Radius (Studs): 110`
- `Standard Attack Damage: 35`
- `Attack Cooldown: 2.5 Seconds`

## **Obtainment**

- _Unlocked by Default_

## **Loadout**

[_**The Banshee’s Refractions**_](https://trello.com/c/ICJtp32h/293-banshee "‌")

### **Perks**

_**Limerence [x Points]**_ | ‘_Lore’_
Desc.

_**Autophobia [x Points]**_ | ‘_The fear of being left behind, abandoned, or alone.’_
Desc.

_**Keening for the Dead [x Points]**_ | ‘_Lore’_
Desc.

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Sigil: Banshee’s Cry**_ |
Desc

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _**Incapacitated**_ - Unable to interact with anything except for Vaults and Wedges.
- _**Hysteria -**_ Survivor is **Incapacitated**, constantly suffers from a maximum **Heartbeat**, and their **camera wobbles** slightly. A thick **vignette** filter appears around the borders of the screen. Additionally, the Survivor suffers from occasional **directional drift**, causing movement inputs to have a chance to be slightly **offset** and temporarily pushed in a random direction.
- _**Deafened -**_ Audio is muffled and a distinct ringing sound plays over most external audio.
- _**Dazed -**_ Vision becomes indistinct and blurred, causing the camera to wobble randomly back and forth.
- _**Dread**_ - Survivor is afflicted with **Oblivious** and **Blindness.** Chase music is disabled, replaced by a constant full **Heartbeat** sound _(without the icon)_. Vision is severely impaired, with a range restricted to **35 Studs**, a pronounced vignette effect around the border of the screen, and a slightly weaker blindness affliction. The Survivor also hears constant sounds of distant screams surrounding them.

### `Passive A:` `The Wailing`

_Primary Effect:_ Upon **Downing** a **Survivor**, Banshee wails out; causing a difficult _“Wailing Skill-Check”_ to appear for every Survivor working on a **Generator**, and revealing the **Aura** of every Survivor who isn’t crouching or performing a **Objective** or **Healing Action.** Any **Survivor** who misses the difficult Skill-Check will scream, revealing their location and having their Aura revealed for **5 Seconds** and become **Incapacitated** for **6 Seconds.** (_If the Skill-Check is caused while a Skill-Check is already in-play, it will simply wait until that Skill-Check is done and trigger another._)
_Wailing Skill-Checks_ are composed of a **50% Sized Skill-Check** with only a Good Success Zone and a **20% Increased Rotation Speed**.

_Secondary Effect:_ The Wailing has a **Token System**, with each token granting a **5 Stud Reduction** of Banshee’s **Terror Radius** and **-5% Standard Attack Cooldown Reduction.**
A token is granted each time;

- A Survivor is **Killed**
- A Survivor misses _The Wailing_ Skill Check

A token is lost every time Banshee takes **300 Accumulated Damage**.

### `Passive B:` `Ghastly Tethering`

_Primary Effect:_ When a main objective is completed, the Survivor who contributed most becomes your **Fixation.** Every **30 Seconds**, the Fixation and the Banshee have their auras revealed to each other for **3 Seconds.** During this, the Fixation gains **5% Haste**, but if there are any other Survivors within **30 Studs** of them, those Survivors will **scream**, revealing their location and having their Aura revealed for **8 Seconds.**

_Secondary Effect:_ Survivors hit by Banshee’s Standard Attack are afflicted with '_The Banshee’s Curse,'_ for **45 Seconds** which causes all positive luck-based events to have their chances halved.0

### `AB1/Z:` `The Haunting`

Winds up for a moment, floating slightly up into the air and raising her hands before floating quickly forward, phasing through objects and causing a thick, misty fog to form all over the map. Can change directions by turning, with a slightly sluggish turn speed.

On contact with a Survivor, Banshee grabs them with both of her pale hands before screaming directly into their face; dealing **25 Damage** and afflicting them with **Hysteria** for **5 Seconds** and **Deafened** for **8 Seconds.**

Banshee is action-locked for **2 Seconds** afterwards, being able to move at **12** **Walkspeed** during the time but unable to perform any attacks or actions.

- _25s Cooldown_

### `AB2/X:` `Wail of Despair`

Banshee drops her head down into her palms, squirming around and gripping her face uncontrollably before throwing her hands down and letting out a deafening wail ahead of her with an expanding **50° angle** and a **250 Stud Range.**

Survivors hit by this are, **Deafened** and **Dazed** for **7 Seconds** and afflicted with **Dread** and **+35% Stamina Drain** for **4 Seconds.**

If a Survivor is working on an Objective when they are hit by this ability, they are faced with a _The Wailing_ Skill-check.

- _35s Cooldown_

### `AB3/C:` `Banshee's Lullaby`

The Banshee begins to sing a lullaby, a thick fog descending down upon all Survivors within **125 Studs** of her, restricting their vision to **40 Studs** _(20 During ‘The Lament’)_ for **12 Seconds**_._ These Survivors are afflicted with **Oblivious, Blindness,** and **Exhausted** for the full duration of the fog.

Survivors currently working on an objective when this ability is used with them in range, they will be faced with a _Wailing Skill-Check._

If a Survivor is struck with a standard attack during this, they are afflicted with **Hysteria** for **8 Seconds** and doubles the on-hit duration of _The Banshee’s Curse._

- _50s Cooldown_

### `AB4/V:` `The Lament`

Usable while in possession of _10 ‘The Wailing’ Tokens._

On use, the Banshee lets out an otherworldly screech that echoes throughout the map, plunging the entire realm into a deep, thick fog, restricting the vision of all Survivors to **40 Studs** for **30 Seconds.** Any Survivors currently working on an objective when this ability is used will be faced with a _Wailing Skill-Check._

During this, all Survivors suffer from the following effects;

- _Oblivious_
- _Blindness_
- _+35% Stamina Drain_
- _25% Chance for Visions of The Banshee approaching them in the distance every 8 Seconds for 4 Seconds_

Additionally, The Banshee gains the following effects;

- _Aura Reading on Survivors within 50 Studs_
- _Doubles the Duration of ‘The Banshee’s Curse' On-Hit_
- _Afflict Hysteria for 4 Seconds On Standard Attack Hit_

Once the duration expires, the fog will slowly lift over a duration of **5 Seconds**, restoring Survivors' vision over time.

- _75s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - X_
- _Achievement 2 - X_
- _Achievement 3 - X_
- _Achievement 4 - X_
- _Achievement 5 - Kill 100 Survivors_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Matrimony** - The Banshee in a traditional, yet torn, wedding dress. Face covered by a thin veil, with streaks of makeup running down her face._
cards.name: The Banshee

cards.desc:
# **Clay Wánless**

## _"That wretched place took everything from me, and I’ll be damned if I let it happen again."_

### **Profile**

`Age:` `26`
`Birthdate:` `September 6th`
`Origin:` `America`
`Gender:` `Cis Male`

Clay wears a grey trench coat, alongside black jeans and a pair of grey work shoes.
He wears his hair in a wolf-cut, being a matte black colour.
His eyes are green, and has a rough face with a large scar across his jawline.
Around his neck he has a pair of high-tech covert goggles.

_"Viscera and gore paints the snowy landscape._

_The bodies and corpses of friends and foes alike scattered everywhere._

_Pieces of those wretched creatures still twitching even after expiring, but soon to reanimate once more._

_Clay stands there, battered and bloodied with chunks of his squad-mates stuck to his gear, cursing this world for what it’s taken. Cursing his command for even sending him and his mates here._

_As he screams into the seemingly unending blizzard, something appears to sweep across the landscape; a new blinding sensation.. this time a whole lot darker._

_The creatures advancing on him vanish in this dark storm, before it begins to rage on towards him.. and he appears somewhere anew, surrounded by trees..yet, this time they are clear of the thick blankets of snow._

_Although, this does not comfort him. Something is deeply wrong, and he knows that his days in that snowy hellscape are not over."_

## **Overview**

Clay is a great Information gathering Survivor, being able to occasionally detect the positions of all nearby enemies, and has a reliable passive that allows him some stealth opportunities; alongside being immune to some very annoying status effects.

`Idle Animation:` Stands steadfast with his hands firm to his sides, breathing in and out with a strong focus.

`Walking Animation:` Calm walking, his arms alternating slightly in front of him with each step.

`Sprinting Animation:` Runs with heavy, uniform steps.

### **Pros & Cons**

\+Great Information Ability
\+Good Stealth Passive
\+Great Immunities
\+Easy to use ability

\-Goggle Range Downside
\-Stealth Killers

### **Stats**

- `Archetype: Technical`
- `Sub-Archetype: Stealth`
- `Difficulty: 2.5/5`
- `Health: 195`
- `Stamina: 8`
- `Stamina Regen: 0.8`

## **Obtainment**

- _Own_ [_Of Flesh and Blood_](https://trello.com/c/hWM6eeM9/190-of-flesh-and-blood "‌") Chapter

## **Loadout**

### **Perks**

_**Dead Man’s Watch [3 Points]**_ | _“The broken arcana of a great man grants hope to those who touch it.“_
When recovering another Survivor or being recovered, grant both the rescuer and recovered Survivor **15% Haste, Distortion,** and **Endurance** for **6/8/10 Seconds.**

_**A Dance with Death [4 Points]**_ | _“Right up to the edge, it’s a dance with death.“_
Gain **Distortion** while standing still and not performing an action.
All of the following actions are now performed **silently:**

- _Walking & Sprinting_
- _Healing_
- _Unlocking_
- _Medium Vaults_
- _Normal & Rushed Locker Entries_

Additionally, the following actions no longer trigger a **Loud Noise Notification:**

- _Missed Self-Healing Skill-Checks_
- _Medium Vaults_
- _Rushed Locker Entries_

_**The Last Winter [4 Points]**_ | _“I saw the corpses of my team buried in the snow of that damned place.“_
For every Survivor that is killed, you gain a **Token.**

- Grants a stackable radius of **20/25/30 Studs** per Token around you, up to a maximum of **140/175/210 Studs** wherein you are immune to the **Killer’s Aura-reading.** _(Meaning your Aura cannot be read by the Killer if they are inside of this radius.)_

When you are the **Last Survivor Standing**, you gain the following effects:

- **Objective Proficiency** is increased by **+100%.**
- **Healing Proficiency** is increased by **+150%.**

**Increases** your chance of becoming the initial **Fixation** by **100%.**

### **Mastery Perk**

_**Operative**_ | _“I know what I must do.“_

When wielding guns, gain the following effects:

- Increases weapon accuracy by **75%.**
- Increase fire-rate by **25%.**
- Increase reload speed by **20%.**

### [_Status Effects_](https://trello.com/c/gt3JhP4h/18-status-effects-status-hud "‌")_:_

- _Concealed_ - Conceals all actions and blocks all Aura-reading. Also applies the following effects to the effected role:
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Terror Radius/Heartbeat.
  - _(Killer)_ Hides Red Stain.
  - _(Survivor)_ Hides Shadow Trails.
- _Blindness_ - Disables the ability to see **auras** by any mean.
- _Darkness_ - Targets suffering from Darkness suffer from Oblivious, have their vision set to 30 Studs, and only see a pitch black darkness past that range.

### `Passive A:` `Wanless Lineage`

The first time you are chased in a round, immediately gain **Concealed** for **8 Seconds**. If you are the first **Survivor** to be chased in the round, extend the duration to **16 Seconds**. Reactivates after the **Exit Gates** are powered. (_Will not activate mid-chase after Exit Gates are powered, will only activate the next time you are chased. The double bonus is also granted if you are the first to be chased during End-Game._)

Additionally, Clay has **immunity** to **Darkness** and **Blindness.**

### `Passive B:` `Special Operative`

Clay has **100% Accuracy** with all rifles and pistols.

When crafting Ammo, there is a **25% Chance** to craft **+50% Extra Ammo.**

### `AB1/Q:` `R.T.A.N.V.D`

This ability has a “**X%”** battery percentage displayed above it’s icon, with it having **25 Charges.** When not in use, it will recharge at a rate of **0.3c/s.**

Clay can equip or unequip the goggles whenever he feels, grabbing the goggles and strapping it to his face when equipping and unstrapping it when unequipping.

While Clay has them equipped, he gains the following effects:

- **Night Vision**
- **+100% Vision**

Additionally, the goggles will send out a **Ping** every **10 Seconds** that will reveal the **Aura** of all enemies within **250 Studs** for **2 Seconds**. The range is decreased by **50 Studs** for every **20% Missing Health** Clay has.

They will also outline enemies within view and display the name, health, and distance of the enemy above it’s head alongside if it has spotted you or not. It displays the health as both a percentage and a **X/X** number.
Entities are outlined in **Yellow** and the Killer is outlined in **Red.** Survivors are outlined in **Blue.**

### `AB2/E:` `Field Healing`

A short animation plays where Clay rubs an ointment on his arm, healing **25%** of his missing health over the course of **5 Seconds** and reducing the duration of all current debuffs by **5 Seconds.**

Clay can perform this on another Survivor by holding space nearby them and pressing this ability key.

- _30s Cooldown_

### `AB3/F:` `Active Reload`

Clay ejects the current magazine in his gun, instantly reloading his gun and gaining **+25% Fire Rate** and **+30% Lifesteal** for **8 Seconds.**

Clay loses the ejected ammo. Usable without ammo but doubles the cooldown.

- _25s Cooldown_

## **Mastery Achievements**

- _Achievement 1 - Escape the Killer 100 Times while under the effects of Wanless Lineage_
- _Achievement 2 - Ping the Killer 1,000 Times using R.T.A.N.V.D_
- _Achievement 3 - Use Field Healing During Chase or within 10 Seconds of Breaking Chase 100 Times_
- _Achievement 4 - Use Active Reload in Chase 250 Times_
- _Achievement 5 - Escape 100 Times_

## **Skins**

- _**[Mastery] Remembrance** - Skin based on a bloodied Covert Ops. Outfit that Clay used while deployed in the Sinevo Region._

cards.desc:
# **The Butcher’s ‘Zelkova'**

_"The masked figure steps across the cracked and ashy landscape, glaring forward at a man donning a top-hat standing ahead; facing away, overlooking the deep cavern. The masked figure tightens their grip on their long, shaded blade._

_‘Ato.’ The mysterious man utters, turning around to face the masked figure dubbed Ato, the man’s face obscured and replaced instead with a blinding light taken shape into that of a triangle.._

_‘You’ve made it. Have you finally taken hold of what you so fervently desired? What you’ve come so far to achieve?'_

_The masked figure turns their head down, gripping their weapon harder and trembling slightly, filled with an unbridled rage and hatred as black blood flows from the various wounds littering Ato’s shoulder, punctured by various weapons._

_In a shaky, yet silky voice, Ato speaks; ‘This will be my last work. For my solitary brethren. For those who were ‘born wrong’ into this accursed, cruel, and unforgiving world, craving blood and flesh like myself._ _My relentless pursuit will not cease until this grand finale reaches its final coda. Where my kin found only failure, I will plant the seed of what was meant to be into those who remain.’_

_The man places his hand onto his face, chuckling in response._

_‘Your ardor for this pursuit will not end how you’d want it to be. Your story will be a tragedy, for you and the souls that follow your tracks. You’re a child who has lost it’s way back home, and forgot that you even have the option to.'_

_‘I will see this through. If no one steps forward, we will continue to perish, and the world will march on as it always has. It might not be a bad thing in and of itself, but.. the world is like an egg. To give birth to something, you’ve got to destroy the world right before your eyes.'_

_The man places his hands behind his back, interlocking his fingers as he nods. You may be right, but mankind is not merely cunning; it is insidious. Time need but pass, and not just the foe, but the very ideals they champion will inevitably rise again._ _Man, and all that his cities represent, will come again. The world itself toils in the darkness to undo loss.'_

_‘Then the more that die and break, the better.’ Ato rebuts._

_‘You cannot change, can you, Ardor?'_

_Ato winces subtlety hearing that name, before collecting themselves once again._
_‘I’ve once tried to change my reality, altering the narrative of my own story. I’ve come to realize I am fundamentally unchangeable. What cannot be changed can only be broken. This is so to me, who left behind everything necessary inside the womb. Born without the ‘necessary’ components; the humanity, the innocence, the capacity for genuine change. Therefore, I can only be shattered, or take hold, become the destructive force that shatters others.'_

_‘You’re certain this is the path you want to go down?'_
_Ato readies their blade, pointing it forward at the man._

_The man sighs. ‘So be it, then. I’ll see you on the other side, Ardor. The end.. always comes in the blink of an eye.'_
_They glare at the man scornfully, before suddenly being chained down to the ground; a searing pain shooting up their arm, a blood-red spike having pierced through their palm. Chains are seen coiled up it’s body, glowing with a sinister, crimson red as unfiltered and vehement rage pulses through Ato’s body. The spike glows, runes and symbols crawling all around it’s cracked and shattered surface. The symbols crawl across Ato’s body, sending pain scouring all across their very soul; overflowing with the fervid rage they had felt for so, so long._

_Consuming them._

_Becoming one with the poor, foolish soul, their very being, attaching itself to that blind, obsessive vengeance they had felt for so long; all to reclaim what they should have had._

_Take. Acts of taking are equally evil._ _As is the nature of our existence; taking, from the moment of conception itself; food, the people that we involve ourselves with, even our own flesh and blood, we take. For as long as we live, we will continue to take, to slaughter, to kill._

_So, take it all back, Ardor. Reclaim what was owed to you and your kin. Take, and continue to take._

_Life is to constantly sin. Life is evil itself. I am aware of it, I am evil.. and so are you all."_
cards.name: The Ardor - 'Zelkova'
Objects (That Appear in Lore & Descriptions Sometimes)
